---
title: "code"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-25"
---

```{r}
# Helper function to install CRAN packages if not already installed
install_if_missing <- function(pkg) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    install.packages(pkg, dependencies = TRUE)
  }
}

# List of CRAN packages
cran_packages <- c(
  "plyr", "doBy", "survival", "coin", "ggplot2", "lattice", "hexbin",
  "randomForest", "ggthemes", "reshape2", "ca", "FactoMineR", "MASS", "grid",
  "missMDA", "plotrix", "stats", "gdata", "psych", "corrplot", "scales",
  "RColorBrewer", "plotly", "ggsignif", "vegan", "gplots", "ggpubr",
  "dplyr", "tidyr"
)

# Install CRAN packages
lapply(cran_packages, install_if_missing)

# Install 'heatmap.2' (part of gplots, already included above)

# Install devtools if not present
install_if_missing("devtools")
library(devtools)

# Install RCM package from GitHub
if (!requireNamespace("RCM", quietly = TRUE)) {
  devtools::install_github("CenterForStatistics-UGent/RCM")
}
library(RCM)
cat("RCM package version", as.character(packageVersion("RCM")), "\n")

# Install BiocManager if needed, then use it to install phyloseq
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("BiocManager")
}
if (!requireNamespace("phyloseq", quietly = TRUE)) {
  BiocManager::install("phyloseq")
}
library(phyloseq)

# Load all packages
lapply(c(cran_packages, "RCM", "phyloseq"), library, character.only = TRUE)

```



```{r}
### Load packages
library(plyr)
library(doBy)
library(survival)
library(coin)
library(ggplot2)
library(lattice)
library(hexbin)
library(randomForest)
library(ggthemes)
library(reshape2)
library(ca)
library(FactoMineR)
library(MASS)
library(grid)
library(missMDA)
library(plotrix)
library(stats)
library(gdata)
library(psych)
library(corrplot)
library(scales)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(plotly)
library(ggsignif)
library(vegan)
library(plyr)
library(gplots)
library(devtools)
library(RCM)
library(phyloseq)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(readr)
library(purrr)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggcorrplot)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest) # for p-values in lmer
library(dplyr)

```



```{r}
Shiseido_metadata_3 <- read.csv("../data/Shiseido_metadata_2.tsv", header=TRUE, sep="\t", stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
### Import exported dataframe
Shiseidodf <- read.csv("../data/Shiseidodfc.txt", header=TRUE, sep="\t", stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
alpha1 <- read_tsv("../output/alpha_diversity/217014_alpha-diversity.tsv", col_types = cols())
alpha2 <- read_tsv("../output/alpha_diversity/217015_alpha-diversity.tsv", col_types = cols())
# Step 2: Combine alpha diversity tables
alpha_combined <- full_join(alpha1, alpha2, by = "#SampleID")

# Join using SampleID_2 in metadata and #SampleID in alpha
merged_metadata_2 <- Shiseido_metadata_3 %>%
  left_join(alpha_combined, by = c("SampleID_2" = "#SampleID"))


merged_metadata_2 <- merge(
  merged_metadata_2,
  Shiseidodf[, c("X.SampleID", "Face_site")],
  by.x = "SampleID_2",
  by.y = "X.SampleID",
  all.x = TRUE  # keep all rows from merged_metadata_2
)


# Add new column with only the part before the dash
merged_metadata_2$Subject_ID <- sub("-.*", "", merged_metadata_2$microbiome_ID)


Shiseido_metadata <- merged_metadata_2
```


```{r}

fill_colors <- c(
  "Forehead" = "#ffc65e",   # warm amber
  "Nose"     = "#5693c7",   # soft blue
  "Cheek"    = "#8ccd87",   # light green
  "Ear"      = "#9dcfcf",   # muted teal (cooler, pairs with Nose & Cheek)
  "Temple"   = "#f29d1e",   # bold warm orange (near Forehead)
  "Chin"     = "#bfa6d0",   # lavender (softer contrast after orange)
  "Neck"     = "#d3d3d3"    # neutral gray (least visually dominant, good for last)
)

border_colors <- c(
  "Forehead" = "#e0a846",  # darker amber
  "Nose"     = "#3a6b99",  # darker blue
  "Cheek"    = "#4a7a4f",  # deeper green
  "Ear"      = "#6ca5a5",  # darker teal
  "Temple"   = "#c97e0f",  # deeper warm orange
  "Chin"     = "#9989ac",  # deeper lavender
  "Neck"     = "#a9a9a9"   # medium gray
)
```


# Figure 2 


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(emmeans)
library(car)
library(broom)

# ── Shared themes ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
shared_theme_bw <- theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid       = element_blank(),
    axis.title       = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text        = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position  = "bottom",
    legend.title     = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text      = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.key.size  = unit(0.8, "cm"),
    legend.spacing.x = unit(0.4, "cm")
  )

shared_theme_minimal <- theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid       = element_blank(),
    axis.line        = element_line(color = "black"),
    axis.ticks       = element_line(color = "black"),
    axis.title       = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text        = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position  = "bottom",
    legend.title     = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text      = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.key.size  = unit(0.8, "cm"),
    legend.spacing.x = unit(0.4, "cm")
  )

# ── Shared helper functions ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Build x-axis labels with sample counts
make_x_labels <- function(df, group_var) {
  df %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(group_var))) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(label = paste0(.data[[group_var]], "\n(n=", n, ")")) %>%
    { setNames(.$label, .[[group_var]]) }
}

make_legend_labels <- function(df, group_var) {
  df %>%
    count(.data[[group_var]]) %>%
    mutate(label = paste0(.data[[group_var]], " (n = ", n, ")")) %>%
    { setNames(.$label, .[[group_var]]) }
}
# Get pairwise label regardless of group order
get_label <- function(g1, g2, df) {
  row <- df[(df$Group1 == g1 & df$Group2 == g2) | (df$Group1 == g2 & df$Group2 == g1), ]
  if (nrow(row) == 1) row$label else NA
}

# Build annotation df for 3-group pairwise (Forehead/Nose/Cheek)
make_annotation_df <- function(wilcox_df, y_positions, y_max) {
  data.frame(
    x    = c("Forehead", "Nose",  "Forehead"),
    xend = c("Nose",     "Cheek", "Cheek"),
    label = c(
      get_label("Forehead", "Nose",  wilcox_df),
      get_label("Nose",     "Cheek", wilcox_df),
      get_label("Forehead", "Cheek", wilcox_df)
    ),
    y = y_max * y_positions
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      x_num    = match(x,    c("Forehead", "Nose", "Cheek")),
      xend_num = match(xend, c("Forehead", "Nose", "Cheek")),
      xmid     = (x_num + xend_num) / 2
    )
}

# Run Kruskal-Wallis + pairwise Wilcoxon, return tidy annotation df
run_nonparam_tests <- function(df, value_var, y_positions) {
  kruskal.test(reformulate("Face_site", value_var), data = df)

  wilcox_df <- pairwise.wilcox.test(
    df[[value_var]], df$Face_site, p.adjust.method = "BH"
  ) %>%
    broom::tidy() %>%
    rename(Group1 = group1, Group2 = group2, p_adj = p.value) %>%
    mutate(
      signif = case_when(
        p_adj < 0.001 ~ "***", p_adj < 0.01 ~ "**",
        p_adj < 0.05  ~ "*",  TRUE           ~ "ns"
      ),
      label = paste0(signif, " p = ", formatC(p_adj, format = "e", digits = 2))
    )

  make_annotation_df(wilcox_df, y_positions, max(df[[value_var]], na.rm = TRUE))
}

# ── Prepare base data ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
prep_avg <- function(var) {
  Shiseido_metadata %>%
    filter(Face_site %in% c("Forehead", "Nose", "Cheek")) %>%
    mutate(
      !!var := as.numeric(.data[[var]]),
      Subject_ID = as.factor(Subject_ID),
      Face_site  = factor(Face_site, levels = c("Forehead", "Nose", "Cheek"))
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[var]])) %>%
    group_by(Subject_ID, Face_site) %>%
    summarise(across(all_of(var), \(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)), .groups = "drop")
}

# ── Plot a: Skin Redness (a*) ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
df_a    <- prep_avg("a")
x_labels_a <- make_x_labels(df_a, "Face_site")

model_aov_a <- aov(a ~ Face_site, data = df_a)
tukey_a <- TukeyHSD(model_aov_a)$Face_site %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("Comparison") %>%
  mutate(
    signif = case_when(
      `p adj` < 0.001 ~ "***", `p adj` < 0.01 ~ "**",
      `p adj` < 0.05  ~ "*",  TRUE             ~ "ns"
    ),
    label = paste0(signif, " p = ", formatC(`p adj`, format = "e", digits = 2))
  )

annot_a <- data.frame(
  x    = c("Forehead", "Nose",  "Forehead"),
  xend = c("Nose",     "Cheek", "Cheek"),
  y    = c(16.0, 15.0, 15.5),
  label = tukey_a$label[match(
    c("Nose-Forehead", "Cheek-Nose", "Cheek-Forehead"), tukey_a$Comparison)]
) %>% mutate(
  x_num = match(x, c("Forehead","Nose","Cheek")),
  xend_num = match(xend, c("Forehead","Nose","Cheek")),
  xmid = (x_num + xend_num) / 2
)

Skin_Redness <- ggplot(df_a, aes(x = Face_site, y = a, fill = Face_site, color = Face_site)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(pch = 21, position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 1.5),
             size = 1.5, stroke = 0.3, alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_colors,    name = "Face Site") +
  scale_color_manual(values = border_colors, name = "Face Site") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels_a) +
  labs(y = "Skin Redness (a*)", x = NULL) +
  shared_theme_bw +
  geom_segment(data = annot_a, aes(x = x, xend = xend, y = y, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE, color = "black") +
  geom_text(data = annot_a, aes(x = xmid, y = y + 0.2, label = label),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 4)

# ── Plot b: Skin Brightness (L*) ──────────────────────────────────────────────
df_L    <- prep_avg("L")
x_labels_L <- make_x_labels(df_L, "Face_site")

model_aov_L <- aov(L ~ Face_site, data = df_L)
tukey_L <- TukeyHSD(model_aov_L)$Face_site %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("Comparison") %>%
  mutate(
    signif = case_when(
      `p adj` < 0.001 ~ "***", `p adj` < 0.01 ~ "**",
      `p adj` < 0.05  ~ "*",  TRUE             ~ "ns"
    ),
    label = paste0(signif, " p = ", formatC(`p adj`, format = "e", digits = 2))
  )

annot_L <- data.frame(
  x    = c("Forehead", "Nose",  "Forehead"),
  xend = c("Nose",     "Cheek", "Cheek"),
  y    = c(74.0, 72.0, 73.0),
  label = tukey_L$label[match(
    c("Nose-Forehead", "Cheek-Nose", "Cheek-Forehead"), tukey_L$Comparison)]
) %>% mutate(
  x_num = match(x, c("Forehead","Nose","Cheek")),
  xend_num = match(xend, c("Forehead","Nose","Cheek")),
  xmid = (x_num + xend_num) / 2
)

Skin_Brightness <- ggplot(df_L, aes(x = Face_site, y = L, fill = Face_site, color = Face_site)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(pch = 21, position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 1.5),
             size = 1.5, stroke = 0.3, alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_colors,    name = "Face Site") +
  scale_color_manual(values = border_colors, name = "Face Site") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels_L) +
  labs(y = "Skin Brightness (L*)", x = NULL) +
  shared_theme_bw +
  geom_segment(data = annot_L, aes(x = x, xend = xend, y = y, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE, color = "black") +
  geom_text(data = annot_L, aes(x = xmid, y = y + 0.4, label = label),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 4)

# ── Plot c: Sebum content ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
df_sebum    <- prep_avg("sebum")
x_labels_sebum <- make_x_labels(df_sebum, "Face_site")
annot_sebum <- run_nonparam_tests(df_sebum, "sebum", c(1.04, 0.92, 0.98))

Skin_Sebum_subset <- ggplot(df_sebum, aes(x = Face_site, y = sebum, fill = Face_site, color = Face_site)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(pch = 21, position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 1.5),
             size = 1.5, stroke = 0.3, alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_colors,    name = "Face Site") +
  scale_color_manual(values = border_colors, name = "Face Site") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels_sebum) +
  labs(y = expression("Sebum content (" * mu * "g/cm"^2 * ")"), x = NULL) +
  shared_theme_bw +
  geom_segment(data = annot_sebum, aes(x = x, xend = xend, y = y, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE, color = "black") +
  geom_text(data = annot_sebum,
            aes(x = xmid, y = y + 0.025 * max(df_sebum$sebum, na.rm = TRUE), label = label),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 4)

# ── Plot d: Skin Temperature ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
df_temp <- Shiseido_metadata %>%
  filter(Face_site %in% c("Forehead", "Nose", "Cheek"), !is.na(skin_temparature)) %>%
  mutate(Subject_ID = as.factor(Subject_ID),
         Face_site  = factor(Face_site, levels = c("Forehead", "Nose", "Cheek"))) %>%
  group_by(Subject_ID, Face_site) %>%
  summarise(skin_temparature = mean(skin_temparature, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

x_labels_temp <- make_x_labels(df_temp, "Face_site")
annot_temp    <- run_nonparam_tests(df_temp, "skin_temparature", c(1.02, 1.00, 1.01))

Skin_Temp <- ggplot(df_temp, aes(x = Face_site, y = skin_temparature, fill = Face_site, color = Face_site)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(pch = 21, position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 1.5),
             size = 1.5, stroke = 0.3, alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_colors,    name = "Face Site") +
  scale_color_manual(values = border_colors, name = "Face Site") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels_temp) +
  labs(y = "Skin Temperature (ºC)", x = NULL) +
  shared_theme_bw +
  geom_segment(data = annot_temp, aes(x = x, xend = xend, y = y, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE, color = "black") +
  geom_text(data = annot_temp,
            aes(x = xmid, y = y + 0.0025 * max(df_temp$skin_temparature, na.rm = TRUE), label = label),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 4)

# ── Plot e: Water Content ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
df_water <- Shiseido_metadata %>%
  filter(Face_site %in% c("Forehead", "Nose", "Cheek"), !is.na(water_content)) %>%
  mutate(Subject_ID = as.factor(Subject_ID),
         Face_site  = factor(Face_site, levels = c("Forehead", "Nose", "Cheek"))) %>%
  group_by(Subject_ID, Face_site) %>%
  summarise(water_content = mean(water_content, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

x_labels_water <- make_x_labels(df_water, "Face_site")
annot_water    <- run_nonparam_tests(df_water, "water_content", c(1.10, 1.00, 1.05))

Skin_WaterContent <- ggplot(df_water, aes(x = Face_site, y = water_content, fill = Face_site, color = Face_site)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(pch = 21, position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 1.5),
             size = 1.5, stroke = 0.3, alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_colors,    name = "Face Site") +
  scale_color_manual(values = border_colors, name = "Face Site") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels_water) +
  labs(y = "Water Content (a.u.)", x = NULL) +
  shared_theme_bw +
  geom_segment(data = annot_water, aes(x = x, xend = xend, y = y, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE, color = "black") +
  geom_text(data = annot_water,
            aes(x = xmid, y = y + 0.03 * max(df_water$water_content, na.rm = TRUE), label = label),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 4)

# ── Helper: LMM scatter plot ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
make_lmm_scatter <- function(df, x_var, y_var, x_lab, y_lab, title) {
  model  <- lmer(reformulate(c(x_var, "Face_site", "(1 | Subject_ID)"), y_var), data = df)
  smry   <- summary(model)$coefficients
  cor_text <- paste0("β = ", round(smry[x_var, "Estimate"], 2),
                     ", p = ", signif(smry[x_var, "Pr(>|t|)"], 2))
  leg_labels <- make_legend_labels(df, "Face_site")

  ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[x_var]], y = .data[[y_var]])) +
    geom_point(aes(fill = Face_site, color = Face_site),
               shape = 21, size = 3, alpha = 0.6, stroke = 0.6) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.7) +
    annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = cor_text,
             hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.5, size = 4) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = fill_colors,    labels = leg_labels, name = "Face Site") +
    scale_color_manual(values = border_colors, labels = leg_labels, name = "Face Site") +
    labs(x = x_lab, y = y_lab, title = title) +
    shared_theme_minimal
}

# ── Plots f–h: LMM scatter plots ─────────────────────────────────────────────
df_La <- Shiseido_metadata %>%
  mutate(L = as.numeric(L), a = as.numeric(a),
         Subject_ID = as.factor(Subject_ID), Face_site = as.factor(Face_site)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(L), !is.na(a)) %>%
  group_by(Subject_ID, Face_site) %>%
  summarise(mean_L = mean(L, na.rm = TRUE), mean_a = mean(a, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

df_sebum_a <- Shiseido_metadata %>%
  mutate(sebum = as.numeric(sebum), a = as.numeric(a),
         Subject_ID = as.factor(Subject_ID), Face_site = as.factor(Face_site)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(sebum), !is.na(a)) %>%
  group_by(Subject_ID, Face_site) %>%
  summarise(mean_sebum = mean(sebum, na.rm = TRUE), mean_a = mean(a, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

df_sebum_L <- Shiseido_metadata %>%
  mutate(sebum = as.numeric(sebum), L = as.numeric(L),
         Subject_ID = as.factor(Subject_ID), Face_site = as.factor(Face_site)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(sebum), !is.na(L)) %>%
  group_by(Subject_ID, Face_site) %>%
  summarise(mean_sebum = mean(sebum, na.rm = TRUE), mean_L = mean(L, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

e_LM_avg <- make_lmm_scatter(df_La, "mean_L", "mean_a",
  "Skin Brightness (L*)", "Skin Redness (a*)",
  "Association between skin brightness and redness")

skinredness_sebum_LM_avg <- make_lmm_scatter(df_sebum_a, "mean_sebum", "mean_a",
  "Sebum content (µg/cm²)", "Skin Redness (a*)",
  "Association between sebum content and skin redness")

skinbrightness_sebum_LM_avg <- make_lmm_scatter(df_sebum_L, "mean_sebum", "mean_L",
  "Sebum content (µg/cm²)", "Skin Brightness (L*)",
  "Association between sebum content and skin brightness")

# ── Plot i: Sebum by Subject (Kruskal-Wallis) ─────────────────────────────────
metadata_with_runorder <- read.csv("../data/metadata_with_runorder_050132025.csv")

q           <- quantile(metadata_with_runorder$sebum, probs = c(0.25, 0.75), na.rm = TRUE)
low_thresh  <- q[1]; high_thresh <- q[2]

df_avg_sebum <- metadata_with_runorder %>%
  filter(!is.na(Subject_ID), !is.na(sebum),
         Face_site %in% c("Forehead", "Nose", "Cheek")) %>%
  mutate(Subject_ID = as.factor(Subject_ID), Face_site = as.factor(Face_site)) %>%
  group_by(Subject_ID, Face_site) %>%
  summarise(sebum = mean(sebum, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

subject_median_info <- df_avg_sebum %>%
  group_by(Subject_ID) %>%
  summarise(median_sebum = median(sebum, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(sebum_group_median = case_when(
    median_sebum < low_thresh  ~ "low",
    median_sebum > high_thresh ~ "high",
    TRUE                       ~ "medium"
  ))

df_avg_sebum <- df_avg_sebum %>%
  left_join(subject_median_info, by = "Subject_ID") %>%
  mutate(
    sebum_group_median = factor(sebum_group_median, levels = c("low", "medium", "high")),
    Subject_ID = factor(Subject_ID,
      levels = subject_median_info %>% arrange(median_sebum) %>% pull(Subject_ID))
  )

kw_p <- kruskal.test(sebum ~ Subject_ID, data = df_avg_sebum)$p.value

group_counts  <- df_avg_sebum %>%
  group_by(sebum_group_median) %>% summarise(n = n()) %>%
  mutate(label = case_when(
    sebum_group_median == "low"    ~ paste0("Low (< ", low_thresh,  " µg/cm²) (n=", n, ")"),
    sebum_group_median == "medium" ~ paste0("Medium (", low_thresh, "–", high_thresh, " µg/cm²) (n=", n, ")"),
    sebum_group_median == "high"   ~ paste0("High (> ", high_thresh," µg/cm²) (n=", n, ")")
  ))
legend_labels <- setNames(group_counts$label, group_counts$sebum_group_median)

Skin_Sebum_KW_subjects <- ggplot(df_avg_sebum,
    aes(y = sebum, x = Subject_ID, fill = sebum_group_median, color = sebum_group_median)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, color = "black") +
  geom_point(pch = 21, position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.5),
             size = 1.5, stroke = 0.3, alpha = 0.6, color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = c("low" = "#4575b4", "medium" = "#fee0b6", "high" = "#e08214"),
                    name    = "Sebum Group (Median)", labels = legend_labels) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("low" = "#4575b4", "medium" = "#fee0b6", "high" = "#e08214"),
                     guide  = "none") +
  scale_y_log10() +
  labs(y = expression("Sebum content (" * mu * "g/cm"^2 * ")"), x = "Subject ID") +
  shared_theme_bw +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  annotate("text", x = 7, y = Inf,
           label = paste0("Kruskal-Wallis, p = ", format(kw_p, digits = 3, scientific = TRUE)),
           vjust = 1.5, size = 4)

# ── Assemble Figure 2 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
boxplot_fg <- ggarrange(
  Skin_Redness, Skin_Brightness, Skin_Sebum_subset, Skin_Temp, Skin_WaterContent,
  ncol = 5, labels = c("a","b","c","d","e"),
  common.legend = TRUE, legend = "bottom",
  font.label = list(size = 18, face = "bold")
)

corrplot <- ggarrange(
  e_LM_avg, skinredness_sebum_LM_avg, skinbrightness_sebum_LM_avg,
  ncol = 3, labels = c("f","g","h"),
  common.legend = TRUE, legend = "bottom",
  font.label = list(size = 18, face = "bold")
)

top_grid <- ggarrange(
  boxplot_fg, corrplot, Skin_Sebum_KW_subjects,
  ncol = 1, nrow = 3,
  labels = c("", "", "i"),
  heights = c(1, 1, 0.75),
  font.label = list(size = 18, face = "bold")
)


```

```{r}
# ── Save ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ggsave("../figures/main/Figure2.png", plot = top_grid, width = 17, height = 14, dpi = 300)
ggsave("../figures/main/Figure2.svg", plot = top_grid, width = 17, height = 14)
```

# Figure 3


```{r}
# ── Shared theme ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
shared_theme <- theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid       = element_blank(),
    axis.line        = element_line(color = "black"),
    axis.ticks       = element_line(color = "black"),
    axis.title       = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text        = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position  = "bottom",
    legend.title     = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text      = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.key.size  = unit(0.8, "cm"),
    legend.spacing.x = unit(0.4, "cm")
  )

# ── Prepare data ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
df_lmm <- Shiseido_metadata %>%
  filter(Face_site %in% c("Forehead", "Nose", "Cheek"),
         !is.na(shannon_entropy),
         Subject_ID != "na") %>%
  mutate(
    Subject_ID = as.factor(Subject_ID),
    Face_site  = factor(Face_site, levels = c("Forehead", "Nose", "Cheek"))
  )

# ── x-axis labels with counts (for boxplot) ───────────────────────────────────
x_labels <- df_lmm %>%
  group_by(Face_site) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(label = paste0(Face_site, "\n(n=", n, ")")) %>%
  with(setNames(label, Face_site))

# ── Legend labels with counts (for scatter plot) ──────────────────────────────
site_counts      <- table(df_lmm$Face_site)
face_site_labels <- setNames(
  paste0(names(site_counts), " (n=", site_counts, ")"),
  names(site_counts)
)

# ── LMM: Shannon entropy ~ Face site ─────────────────────────────────────────
model_lmm <- lmer(shannon_entropy ~ Face_site + (1 | Subject_ID), data = df_lmm)
anova(model_lmm)

pairwise_df <- pairs(emmeans(model_lmm, ~ Face_site), adjust = "BH") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(
    Group1  = sub(" - .*", "", contrast),
    Group2  = sub(".*- ",  "", contrast),
    signif  = case_when(
      p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p.value < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p.value < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE            ~ "ns"
    ),
    label = paste0(signif, " p = ", formatC(p.value, format = "e", digits = 2)),
    x     = match(Group1, levels(df_lmm$Face_site)),
    xend  = match(Group2, levels(df_lmm$Face_site)),
    xmid  = (x + xend) / 2
  )

y_max          <- max(df_lmm$shannon_entropy, na.rm = TRUE)
pairwise_df$y  <- y_max * seq(1.10, 1.00, length.out = nrow(pairwise_df))

# ── Plot A: Shannon entropy boxplot ───────────────────────────────────────────
Shannon_entropy_plot_lmm <- ggplot(df_lmm,
    aes(x = Face_site, y = shannon_entropy, fill = Face_site, color = Face_site)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(pch = 21, position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 1.5),
             size = 1.5, stroke = 0.3, alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_colors,   labels = face_site_labels) +
  scale_color_manual(values = border_colors, labels = face_site_labels) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels) +
  labs(y = "Shannon Entropy", x = NULL,
       title = "16S rRNA (V4) Alpha Diversity",
       fill = "Face Site", color = "Face Site") +
  shared_theme +
  geom_segment(data = pairwise_df,
               aes(x = x, xend = xend, y = y, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE, color = "black") +
  geom_text(data = pairwise_df,
            aes(x = xmid, y = y + 0.02 * y_max, label = label),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 4)

# ── LMM: Sebum ~ Shannon + Face site ─────────────────────────────────────────
model_lmm_sebum <- lmer(sebum ~ shannon_entropy + Face_site + (1 | Subject_ID),
                        data = df_lmm)
summary(model_lmm_sebum)

sebum_coef <- summary(model_lmm_sebum)$coefficients["shannon_entropy", ]
cor_text   <- paste0("β = ", round(sebum_coef["Estimate"], 2),
                     ", p = ", signif(sebum_coef["Pr(>|t|)"], 2))

# ── Plot B: Sebum ~ Shannon scatter ───────────────────────────────────────────
sebum_shannon_entropy_lmm <- ggplot(df_lmm, aes(x = shannon_entropy, y = sebum)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = Face_site, color = Face_site),
             shape = 21, size = 3, alpha = 0.6, stroke = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.7) +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = cor_text,
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.5, size = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_colors,    labels = face_site_labels) +
  scale_color_manual(values = border_colors, labels = face_site_labels) +
  labs(x = "Shannon Entropy",
       y = expression("Sebum content (" * mu * "g/cm"^2 * ")"),
       title = "Association between Shannon Entropy and Sebum Content",
       fill = "Face Site", color = "Face Site") +
  shared_theme


# ── Assemble Figure 3 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
boxplot_fg <- ggarrange(
  Shannon_entropy_plot_lmm, sebum_shannon_entropy_lmm,
  ncol = 2, nrow = 1,
  labels = c("a", "b"),
  common.legend = FALSE,
  font.label = list(size = 18, face = "bold")
)

empty_fg <- ggarrange(
  NULL, NULL,
  ncol = 2, nrow = 1,
  labels = c("c", "d"),
  font.label = list(size = 18, face = "bold")
)

top_grid <- ggarrange(
  boxplot_fg, empty_fg,
  ncol = 1, nrow = 2,
  heights = c(1, 1),
  font.label = list(size = 18, face = "bold")
)
```


```{r}
# ── Save ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ggsave("../figures/main/Figure3.png", plot = top_grid,
       width = 13, height = 11, dpi = 300)
ggsave("../figures/main/Figure3.svg", plot = top_grid,
       width = 13, height = 11)
```


# Supplementary Figure 1

```{r}
# ── Helper: age correlation scatter ──────────────────────────────────────────
make_age_cor_scatter <- function(df, x_var, y_var, y_lab, title) {
  p_x    <- shapiro.test(df[[x_var]])$p.value
  p_y    <- shapiro.test(df[[y_var]])$p.value
  method <- ifelse(p_x > 0.05 & p_y > 0.05, "pearson", "spearman")

  cor_test  <- cor.test(df[[x_var]], df[[y_var]], method = method)
  cor_label <- ifelse(method == "pearson", "Pearson r", "Spearman ρ")
  cor_text  <- paste0(cor_label, " = ", round(cor_test$estimate, 2),
                      ", p = ", signif(cor_test$p.value, 2))

  leg_labels <- make_legend_labels(df, "Face_site")

  ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[x_var]], y = .data[[y_var]])) +
    geom_point(aes(fill = Face_site, color = Face_site),
               shape = 21, size = 3, alpha = 0.6, stroke = 0.6) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.7) +
    annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = cor_text,
             hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.5, size = 4) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = fill_colors,    labels = leg_labels, name = "Face Site") +
    scale_color_manual(values = border_colors, labels = leg_labels, name = "Face Site") +
    labs(x = "Age (years)", y = y_lab, title = title) +
    shared_theme_minimal
}

# ── Prepare data ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
df_temp_a <- Shiseido_metadata %>%
  mutate(skin_temparature = as.numeric(skin_temparature), a = as.numeric(a),
         Subject_ID = as.factor(Subject_ID), Face_site = as.factor(Face_site)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(skin_temparature), !is.na(a)) %>%
  group_by(Subject_ID, Face_site) %>%
  summarise(mean_temp = mean(skin_temparature, na.rm = TRUE),
            mean_a    = mean(a,                na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

df_temp_L <- Shiseido_metadata %>%
  mutate(skin_temparature = as.numeric(skin_temparature), L = as.numeric(L),
         Subject_ID = as.factor(Subject_ID), Face_site = as.factor(Face_site)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(skin_temparature), !is.na(L)) %>%
  group_by(Subject_ID, Face_site) %>%
  summarise(mean_temp = mean(skin_temparature, na.rm = TRUE),
            mean_L    = mean(L,                na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

df_water_a <- Shiseido_metadata %>%
  mutate(water_content = as.numeric(water_content), a = as.numeric(a),
         Subject_ID = as.factor(Subject_ID), Face_site = as.factor(Face_site)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(water_content), !is.na(a)) %>%
  group_by(Subject_ID, Face_site) %>%
  summarise(mean_water = mean(water_content, na.rm = TRUE),
            mean_a     = mean(a,             na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

df_water_L <- Shiseido_metadata %>%
  mutate(water_content = as.numeric(water_content), L = as.numeric(L),
         Subject_ID = as.factor(Subject_ID), Face_site = as.factor(Face_site)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(water_content), !is.na(L)) %>%
  group_by(Subject_ID, Face_site) %>%
  summarise(mean_water = mean(water_content, na.rm = TRUE),
            mean_L     = mean(L,             na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

df_R2 <- Shiseido_metadata %>%
  mutate(age = as.numeric(age), cutemeter_R2 = as.numeric(cutemeter_R2),
         Subject_ID = as.factor(Subject_ID), Face_site = as.factor(Face_site)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(age), !is.na(cutemeter_R2)) %>%
  group_by(Subject_ID, age, Face_site) %>%
  summarise(mean_R2 = mean(cutemeter_R2, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

df_R7 <- Shiseido_metadata %>%
  mutate(age = as.numeric(age), cutemeter_R7 = as.numeric(cutemeter_R7),
         Subject_ID = as.factor(Subject_ID), Face_site = as.factor(Face_site)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(age), !is.na(cutemeter_R7)) %>%
  group_by(Subject_ID, age, Face_site) %>%
  summarise(mean_R7 = mean(cutemeter_R7, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# ── Plots a–d: LMM scatter ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
d_LM_avg <- make_lmm_scatter(df_temp_a, "mean_temp", "mean_a",
  "Skin Temperature (°C)", "Skin Redness (a*)",
  "Association between average skin temperature and skin redness")

c_LM_avg <- make_lmm_scatter(df_temp_L, "mean_temp", "mean_L",
  "Skin Temperature (°C)", "Skin Brightness (L*)",
  "Association between average skin temperature and skin brightness")

skinredness_watercontent_LM_avg <- make_lmm_scatter(df_water_a, "mean_water", "mean_a",
  "Water Content (a.u.)", "Skin Redness (a*)",
  "Association between water content and skin redness")

skinbrightness_watercontent_LM_avg <- make_lmm_scatter(df_water_L, "mean_water", "mean_L",
  "Water Content (a.u.)", "Skin Brightness (L*)",
  "Association between water content and skin brightness")

# ── Plots e–f: Age correlation ────────────────────────────────────────────────
r2_plot <- make_age_cor_scatter(df_R2, "age", "mean_R2",
  "Cutometer R2 (elasticity index)",
  "Correlation between age and cutometer R2")

r7_plot <- make_age_cor_scatter(df_R7, "age", "mean_R7",
  "Cutometer R7 (elastic recovery index)",
  "Correlation between age and cutometer R7")


top_grid_suppl1 <- ggarrange(
  d_LM_avg,
  c_LM_avg,
  skinredness_watercontent_LM_avg,
  skinbrightness_watercontent_LM_avg,
  r2_plot,
  r7_plot,
  ncol          = 2,
  nrow          = 3,
  labels        = c("a","b","c","d","e","f"),
  common.legend = TRUE,
  legend        = "bottom",
  font.label    = list(size = 18, face = "bold")
)


```


```{r}
# PNG
png("../figures/supplementary/suppl_fig1.png", width = 14, height = 13, 
    units = "in", res = 300)
print(top_grid_suppl1)
dev.off()

# SVG
svg("../figures/supplementary/suppl_fig1.svg", width = 14, height = 13)
print(top_grid_suppl1)
dev.off()
```

Supplementary Figure 4-9

```{r}
# Required libraries
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(rstatix)
library(ggpubr)
library(lme4)
library(broom.mixed)
library(performance)
library(patchwork)

# ── Define x variables and labels ────────────────────────────────────────────
x_vars <- c("water_content", "sebum", "a", "L", "skin_temparature")

x_axis_labels <- c(
  "L"                = "Skin Brightness (L*)",
  "a"                = "Skin Redness (a*)",
  "b"                = "Skin Yellowness (b*)",
  "sebum"            = "Sebum concentration (µg/cm²)",
  "water_content"    = "Water Content (a.u.)",
  "skin_temparature" = "Skin Temperature (°C)",
  "age"              = "Age (years)"
)

# ── Define amino acids ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
amino_acids <- c("Asp", "Glu", "hyP", "Ser", "Asn", "Gly", "Gln", "Thr", "Ala", "Tau",
                 "His", "Cit", "Pro", "Arg", "Val", "Tyr", "Met", "Cys2", "Ile", "Leu",
                 "Orn", "Lys", "Phe", "Trp", "Total_AAs")
amino_acids_wo_protein <- paste0(amino_acids, "_wo_Protein")
Shiseido_metadata$Total_AAs_wo_Protein <- Shiseido_metadata$Total_Aas_wo_Protein

# ── y-axis labels ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
y_axis_labels_wo_protein <- c(
  "Asp_wo_Protein"            = "Aspartic Acid",
  "Glu_wo_Protein"            = "Glutamic Acid",
  "hyP_wo_Protein"            = "Hydroxyproline",
  "Ser_wo_Protein"            = "Serine",
  "Asn_wo_Protein"            = "Asparagine",
  "Gly_wo_Protein"            = "Glycine",
  "Gln_wo_Protein"            = "Glutamine",
  "Thr_wo_Protein"            = "Threonine",
  "Ala_wo_Protein"            = "Alanine",
  "Tau_wo_Protein"            = "Taurine",
  "His_wo_Protein"            = "Histidine",
  "Cit_wo_Protein"            = "Citrulline",
  "Pro_wo_Protein"            = "Proline",
  "Arg_wo_Protein"            = "Arginine",
  "Val_wo_Protein"            = "Valine",
  "Tyr_wo_Protein"            = "Tyrosine",
  "Met_wo_Protein"            = "Methionine",
  "Cys2_wo_Protein"           = "Cystine",
  "Ile_wo_Protein"            = "Isoleucine",
  "Leu_wo_Protein"            = "Leucine",
  "Orn_wo_Protein"            = "Ornithine",
  "Lys_wo_Protein"            = "Lysine",
  "Phe_wo_Protein"            = "Phenylalanine",
  "Trp_wo_Protein"            = "Tryptophan",
  "Total_AAs_wo_Protein"      = "Total Amino Acids",
  "Urea_wo_Protein"           = "Urea",
  "Creatinine_wo_Protein"     = "Creatinine",
  "UCA_wo_Protein"            = "Urocanic Acid",
  "LA_wo_Protein"             = "Lactic Acid",
  "PCA_wo_Protein"            = "Pyrrolidone Carboxylic Acid",
  "D.glucosamine_wo_Protein"  = "D-Glucosamine",
  "Total_org._NMF_wo_Protein" = "Total Organic NMF"
)

# ── Model comparison (AIC: raw vs log-transformed) ────────────────────────────
model_comparison_results <- list()
valid_face_sites <- c("Forehead", "Nose", "Cheek")

for (x in x_vars) {
  for (y in amino_acids_wo_protein) {
    sub_df <- Shiseido_metadata %>%
      filter(Face_site %in% valid_face_sites,
             !is.na(Subject_ID), Subject_ID != "na") %>%
      select(Subject_ID, Face_site, all_of(c(x, y))) %>%
      filter(!is.na(.data[[x]]), !is.na(.data[[y]])) %>%
      mutate(Subject_ID = as.factor(Subject_ID),
             Face_site  = as.factor(Face_site))

    if (nrow(sub_df) < 5) next

    model_raw <- tryCatch(
      lmer(as.formula(paste(y, "~", x, "+ Face_site + (1|Subject_ID)")), data = sub_df),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    sub_df$log_x <- log10(pmax(as.numeric(sub_df[[x]]), 1))
    sub_df$log_y <- log10(pmax(as.numeric(sub_df[[y]]), 1))

    model_log <- tryCatch(
      lmer(log_y ~ log_x + Face_site + (1|Subject_ID), data = sub_df),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    if (!is.null(model_raw) && !is.null(model_log)) {
      aic_raw   <- AIC(model_raw)
      aic_log   <- AIC(model_log)
      delta_aic <- aic_raw - aic_log

      model_comparison_results[[paste(x, y, sep = "_")]] <- data.frame(
        X            = x,
        Y            = y,
        AIC_raw      = aic_raw,
        AIC_log      = aic_log,
        Delta_AIC    = delta_aic,
        Better_Model = ifelse(delta_aic > 2, "Log-transformed", "Untransformed or Similar")
      )
    }
  }
}

model_comparison_df <- do.call(rbind, model_comparison_results)

# ── Plotting function ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
output_dir <- "../figures/supplementary/lmm"
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

plot_lmm_by_heatmap_model <- function(x_var, model_comparison_df, metadata_df) {
  message("Processing: ", x_var)

  plot_list     <- list()
  relevant_rows <- model_comparison_df %>% filter(X == x_var)

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(relevant_rows))) {
    y_var        <- relevant_rows$Y[i]
    better_model <- relevant_rows$Better_Model[i]

    sub_df <- metadata_df %>%
      filter(Face_site %in% c("Forehead", "Nose", "Cheek"),
             !is.na(Subject_ID), Subject_ID != "na") %>%
      select(Subject_ID, Face_site, all_of(c(x_var, y_var))) %>%
      filter(!is.na(.data[[x_var]]), !is.na(.data[[y_var]])) %>%
      mutate(Subject_ID = as.factor(Subject_ID),
             Face_site  = as.factor(Face_site))

    if (nrow(sub_df) < 5) next

    # Legend labels with counts
    legend_info <- sub_df %>%
      group_by(Face_site) %>%
      summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
      mutate(label = paste0(Face_site, " (n = ", n, ")"))
    sub_df$Face_site <- factor(sub_df$Face_site, levels = legend_info$Face_site)
    legend_labels    <- setNames(legend_info$label, legend_info$Face_site)

    # ── Build model and base plot ─────────────────────────────────────────────
    if (better_model == "Log-transformed") {
      sub_df$log_x <- log10(pmax(as.numeric(sub_df[[x_var]]), 1))
      sub_df$log_y <- log10(pmax(as.numeric(sub_df[[y_var]]), 1))

      model <- tryCatch(
        lmer(log_y ~ log_x + Face_site + (1 | Subject_ID), data = sub_df),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )
      term      <- "log_x"
      x_label <- bquote(log[10](.(x_axis_labels[[x_var]])))
      y_label <- bquote(log[10](.(y_axis_labels_wo_protein[[y_var]]) ~ "[pmol/cm²]"))
      base_plot <- ggplot(sub_df, aes(x = log_x, y = log_y))

    } else {
      model <- tryCatch(
        lmer(as.formula(paste(y_var, "~", x_var, "+ Face_site + (1 | Subject_ID)")),
             data = sub_df),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )
      term      <- x_var

      x_label <- bquote(log[10](.(x_axis_labels[[x_var]])))
      y_label <- bquote(log[10](.(y_axis_labels_wo_protein[[y_var]]) ~ "[pmol/cm²]"))

      base_plot <- ggplot(sub_df, aes(x = .data[[x_var]], y = .data[[y_var]]))
    }

    if (!is.null(model)) {
      model_summary <- broom.mixed::tidy(model)
      effect_row    <- model_summary %>% filter(term == !!term)

      if (nrow(effect_row) == 1) {
        cor_text <- paste0("β = ", round(effect_row$estimate, 2),
                           ", p = ", signif(effect_row$p.value, 2))

        p <- base_plot +
          geom_point(aes(fill = Face_site, color = Face_site),
                     shape = 21, size = 2.5, alpha = 0.6, stroke = 0.5) +
          geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.6) +
          annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = cor_text,
                   hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.5, size = 3.5) +
          scale_fill_manual(values = fill_colors,    name = "Face Site", labels = legend_labels) +
          scale_color_manual(values = border_colors, guide = "none") +
          labs(title = y_axis_labels_wo_protein[[y_var]], x = x_label, y = y_label) +
          theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
          theme(
            panel.grid = element_blank(),
            axis.line  = element_line(color = "black"),
            axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
            axis.text  = element_text(size = 10),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
            plot.title = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5)
          )

        plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1]] <- p
      }
    }
  }

  if (length(plot_list) > 0) {
    # Apply legend theme to each plot individually — avoids & operator issues
    plot_list <- lapply(plot_list, function(p) {
      p + theme(
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        legend.title     = element_text(size = 11),
        legend.text      = element_text(size = 10),
        plot.tag         = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold")
      )
    })

    combined_plot <- wrap_plots(plot_list, ncol = 4, guides = "collect") +
      plot_annotation(
        title      = paste0("Amino Acid / NMF vs ", x_axis_labels[[x_var]],
                            " (LMM adjusted for Face Site and Subject ID)"),
        tag_levels = "a",
        theme      = theme(                        # ← controls the overall layout theme
          legend.position  = "bottom",
          legend.direction = "horizontal",
          plot.title       = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5)
        )
      )


    png(file.path(output_dir, paste0(x_var, "_vs_aminoacids.png")),
        width = 16, height = 20, units = "in", res = 300)
    print(combined_plot)
    dev.off()

    svg(file.path(output_dir, paste0(x_var, "_vs_aminoacids.svg")),
        width = 16, height = 20)
    print(combined_plot)
    dev.off()
  }
}

# ── Run for all predictors ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
for (x in x_vars) {
  plot_lmm_by_heatmap_model(
    x_var               = x,
    model_comparison_df = model_comparison_df,
    metadata_df         = Shiseido_metadata
  )
}
```

#Supplementary Figure 17-18

```{r}
# Adapt for those 

# Define column names
amino_acids <- c("Urea","Creatinine","UCA","LA","PCA")#,"Total_org._NMF")

amino_acids_wo_protein <- paste0(amino_acids, "_wo_Protein")
```


```{r}
# ── Amino acid definitions ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
amino_acids <- c("Asp", "Glu", "hyP", "Ser", "Asn", "Gly", "Gln", "Thr", "Ala", "Tau",
                 "His", "Cit", "Pro", "Arg", "Val", "Tyr", "Met", "Cys2", "Ile", "Leu",
                 "Orn", "Lys", "Phe", "Trp", "Total_AAs")
amino_acids_wo_protein <- paste0(amino_acids, "_wo_Protein")
Shiseido_metadata$Total_AAs_wo_Protein <- Shiseido_metadata$Total_Aas_wo_Protein
```



```{r}
# ── Plotting function ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
plot_amino_entropy <- function(df, col_name, label, normalized = TRUE) {
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      x_raw = as.numeric(shannon_entropy),
      y_raw = as.numeric(.data[[col_name]]),
      log_x = log10(x_raw + 0.01),
      log_y = log10(y_raw + 0.01)
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(log_x), !is.na(log_y))

  if (nrow(df) < 3 || length(unique(df$log_y)) <= 1) {
    message(paste("Skipping", col_name, "- not enough valid data or no variability."))
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Normality tests on untransformed data to choose method
  p_x <- tryCatch(shapiro.test(df$x_raw)$p.value, error = function(e) NA)
  p_y <- tryCatch(shapiro.test(df$y_raw)$p.value, error = function(e) NA)
  method <- if (!is.na(p_x) && !is.na(p_y) && p_x > 0.05 && p_y > 0.05) "pearson" else "spearman"

  cor_result <- tryCatch(
    cor.test(df$log_x, df$log_y, method = method),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if (is.null(cor_result)) {
    message(paste("Skipping", col_name, "- correlation test failed."))
    return(NULL)
  }

  cor_label <- if (method == "pearson") "Pearson r" else "Spearman \u03c1"
  cor_text  <- paste0(cor_label, " = ", round(cor_result$estimate, 2),
                      ", p = ", signif(cor_result$p.value, 2))

  y_unit  <- if (normalized) "nmol/mg protein" else "pmol/cm\u00b2"
  y_label <- bquote(log[10]*"("*.(label)*" ["*.(y_unit)*"])")

  ggplot(df, aes(x = log_x, y = log_y)) +
    geom_point(aes(fill = Face_site, color = Face_site),
               shape = 21, size = 3, alpha = 0.6, stroke = 0.6) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.7) +
    annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = cor_text,
             hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.5, size = 4) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = fill_colors,    name = "Face Site") +
    scale_color_manual(values = border_colors, name = "Face Site") +
    labs(
      x     = bquote(log[10]*"(Shannon Entropy)"),
      y     = y_label,
      title = paste("Correlation with", label)
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      panel.grid   = element_blank(),
      axis.line    = element_line(color = "black"),
      axis.ticks   = element_line(color = "black"),
      axis.title   = element_text(size = 18),
      axis.text    = element_text(size = 16),
      plot.title   = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
      legend.position  = "bottom",
      legend.title     = element_text(size = 17),
      legend.text      = element_text(size = 16),
      legend.key.size  = unit(0.8, "cm"),
      legend.spacing.x = unit(0.4, "cm")
    )
}

# ── Build plot lists ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
plots <- Filter(Negate(is.null), lapply(amino_acids, function(col) {
  plot_amino_entropy(Shiseido_metadata, col, col, normalized = TRUE)
}))

plots_wo <- Filter(Negate(is.null), lapply(amino_acids_wo_protein, function(col) {
  label <- gsub("_wo_Protein", "", col)
  plot_amino_entropy(Shiseido_metadata, col, label, normalized = FALSE)
}))

# ── Assemble — apply theme per plot to avoid & precedence issue ───────────────
apply_tag_theme <- function(plot_list) {
  lapply(plot_list, function(p) {
    p + theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"))
  })
}



```


```{r}

combined_plot <- wrap_plots(apply_tag_theme(plots), ncol = 4, guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(
    tag_levels = "a",
    theme = theme(
      legend.position  = "bottom",
      legend.direction = "horizontal",
      legend.title     = element_text(size = 17),
      legend.text      = element_text(size = 16),
      legend.key.size  = unit(0.8, "cm"),
      legend.spacing.x = unit(0.4, "cm")
    )
  )

combined_plot_wo <- wrap_plots(apply_tag_theme(plots_wo), ncol = 4, guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(
    tag_levels = "a",
    theme = theme(
      legend.position  = "bottom",
      legend.direction = "horizontal",
      legend.title     = element_text(size = 17),
      legend.text      = element_text(size = 16),
      legend.key.size  = unit(0.8, "cm"),
      legend.spacing.x = unit(0.4, "cm")
    )
  )
# ── Save ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
dir.create("../figures/supplementary/spearman", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

png("../figures/supplementary/spearman/Shannon_vs_AminoAcids_log.png",
    width = 20, height = 28, units = "in", res = 300)
print(combined_plot)
dev.off()

png("../figures/supplementary/spearman/Shannon_vs_AminoAcids_no_protein_log.png",
    width = 22, height = 28, units = "in", res = 300)
print(combined_plot_wo)
dev.off()

svg("../figures/supplementary/spearman/Shannon_vs_AminoAcids_log.svg",
    width = 20, height = 28)
print(combined_plot)
dev.off()

svg("../figures/supplementary/spearman/Shannon_vs_AminoAcids_no_protein_log.svg",
    width = 22, height = 28)
print(combined_plot_wo)
dev.off()
```

```{r}

combined_plot <- wrap_plots(apply_tag_theme(plots), ncol = 2, guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(
    tag_levels = "a",
    theme = theme(
      legend.position  = "bottom",
      legend.direction = "horizontal",
      legend.title     = element_text(size = 17),
      legend.text      = element_text(size = 16),
      legend.key.size  = unit(0.8, "cm"),
      legend.spacing.x = unit(0.4, "cm")
    )
  )

combined_plot_wo <- wrap_plots(apply_tag_theme(plots_wo), ncol = 2, guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(
    tag_levels = "a",
    theme = theme(
      legend.position  = "bottom",
      legend.direction = "horizontal",
      legend.title     = element_text(size = 17),
      legend.text      = element_text(size = 16),
      legend.key.size  = unit(0.8, "cm"),
      legend.spacing.x = unit(0.4, "cm")
    )
  )
# ── Save ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
dir.create("../figures/supplementary/spearman", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

png("../figures/supplementary/spearman/Shannon_vs_NMFs_log.png",
    width = 10, height = 10, units = "in", res = 300)
print(combined_plot)
dev.off()

png("../figures/supplementary/spearman/Shannon_vs_NMFs_no_protein_log.png",
    width = 10, height = 10, units = "in", res = 300)
print(combined_plot_wo)
dev.off()

svg("../figures/supplementary/spearman/Shannon_vs_NMFs_log.svg",
    width = 10, height = 10)
print(combined_plot)
dev.off()

svg("../figures/supplementary/spearman/Shannon_vs_NMFs_no_protein_log.svg",
    width = 10, height = 10)
print(combined_plot_wo)
dev.off()
```

#Figure 4

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(lme4)
library(broom.mixed)
library(performance)
library(ggplot2)

# ── Amino acid definitions ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
amino_acids <- c("Asp", "Glu", "hyP", "Ser", "Asn", "Gly", "Gln", "Thr", "Ala", "Tau",
                 "His", "Cit", "Pro", "Arg", "Val", "Tyr", "Met", "Cys2", "Ile", "Leu",
                 "Orn", "Lys", "Phe", "Trp", "Total_AAs", "Urea", "Creatinine", "UCA",
                 "LA", "PCA", "D.glucosamine", "Total_org._NMF")
amino_acids_wo_protein     <- paste0(amino_acids, "_wo_Protein")
Shiseido_metadata$Total_AAs_wo_Protein <- Shiseido_metadata$Total_Aas_wo_Protein

y_axis_labels_wo_protein <- c(
  "Asp_wo_Protein"            = "Aspartic Acid",
  "Glu_wo_Protein"            = "Glutamic Acid",
  "hyP_wo_Protein"            = "Hydroxyproline",
  "Ser_wo_Protein"            = "Serine",
  "Asn_wo_Protein"            = "Asparagine",
  "Gly_wo_Protein"            = "Glycine",
  "Gln_wo_Protein"            = "Glutamine",
  "Thr_wo_Protein"            = "Threonine",
  "Ala_wo_Protein"            = "Alanine",
  "Tau_wo_Protein"            = "Taurine",
  "His_wo_Protein"            = "Histidine",
  "Cit_wo_Protein"            = "Citrulline",
  "Pro_wo_Protein"            = "Proline",
  "Arg_wo_Protein"            = "Arginine",
  "Val_wo_Protein"            = "Valine",
  "Tyr_wo_Protein"            = "Tyrosine",
  "Met_wo_Protein"            = "Methionine",
  "Cys2_wo_Protein"           = "Cystine",
  "Ile_wo_Protein"            = "Isoleucine",
  "Leu_wo_Protein"            = "Leucine",
  "Orn_wo_Protein"            = "Ornithine",
  "Lys_wo_Protein"            = "Lysine",
  "Phe_wo_Protein"            = "Phenylalanine",
  "Trp_wo_Protein"            = "Tryptophan",
  "Total_AAs_wo_Protein"      = "Total Amino Acids",
  "Urea_wo_Protein"           = "Urea",
  "Creatinine_wo_Protein"     = "Creatinine",
  "UCA_wo_Protein"            = "Urocanic Acid",
  "LA_wo_Protein"             = "Lactic Acid",
  "PCA_wo_Protein"            = "Pyrrolidone Carboxylic Acid",
  "D.glucosamine_wo_Protein"  = "D-Glucosamine",
  "Total_org._NMF_wo_Protein" = "Total Organic NMF"
)

# ── Shared helper: subset and prepare data ────────────────────────────────────
prep_sub_df <- function(x, y, metadata) {
  metadata %>%
    filter(Face_site %in% c("Forehead", "Nose", "Cheek"),
           !is.na(Subject_ID), Subject_ID != "na") %>%
    select(Subject_ID, Face_site, all_of(c(x, y))) %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[x]]), !is.na(.data[[y]])) %>%
    mutate(Subject_ID = as.factor(Subject_ID),
           Face_site  = as.factor(Face_site))
}

# ── Shared helper: finalize LMM result dataframe ──────────────────────────────
finalize_lmm_df <- function(results_list) {
  df <- do.call(rbind, results_list)
  df$q_value <- p.adjust(df$p_value, method = "fdr")
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      signed_logq = -sign(Beta) * log10(q_value),
      stars = case_when(
        q_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
        q_value < 0.01  ~ "**",
        q_value < 0.05  ~ "*",
        TRUE            ~ ""
      ),
      X_label = x_axis_labels[X],
      Y_label = y_axis_labels_wo_protein[Y]
    )
  df$X_label <- factor(df$X_label, levels = x_axis_labels[x_vars])
  df$Y_label <- factor(df$Y_label,
                       levels = rev(y_axis_labels_wo_protein[amino_acids_wo_protein]))
  df
}

# ── Loop 1: raw LMM ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
lmm_results_raw <- list()

for (x in x_vars) {
  for (y in amino_acids_wo_protein) {
    sub_df <- prep_sub_df(x, y, Shiseido_metadata)
    if (nrow(sub_df) < 5) next

    model <- tryCatch(
      lmer(as.formula(paste(y, "~", x, "+ Face_site + (1|Subject_ID)")), data = sub_df),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    if (is.null(model)) next

    effect_row <- broom.mixed::tidy(model) %>% filter(term == x)
    if (nrow(effect_row) != 1) next

    lmm_results_raw[[paste(x, y, sep = "_")]] <- data.frame(
      X = x, Y = y,
      Beta    = effect_row$estimate,
      p_value = effect_row$p.value
    )
  }
}

lmm_df_raw <- finalize_lmm_df(lmm_results_raw)

# ── Loop 2: AIC comparison (raw vs log) ───────────────────────────────────────
model_comparison_results <- list()

for (x in x_vars) {
  for (y in amino_acids_wo_protein) {
    sub_df <- prep_sub_df(x, y, Shiseido_metadata)
    if (nrow(sub_df) < 5) next

    model_raw <- tryCatch(
      lmer(as.formula(paste(y, "~", x, "+ Face_site + (1|Subject_ID)")), data = sub_df),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    sub_df$log_x <- log10(pmax(as.numeric(sub_df[[x]]), 1))
    sub_df$log_y <- log10(pmax(as.numeric(sub_df[[y]]), 1))
    model_log <- tryCatch(
      lmer(log_y ~ log_x + Face_site + (1|Subject_ID), data = sub_df),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    if (is.null(model_raw) || is.null(model_log)) next

    delta_aic <- AIC(model_raw) - AIC(model_log)
    model_comparison_results[[paste(x, y, sep = "_")]] <- data.frame(
      X = x, Y = y,
      AIC_raw      = AIC(model_raw),
      AIC_log      = AIC(model_log),
      Delta_AIC    = delta_aic,
      Better_Model = ifelse(delta_aic > 2, "Log-transformed", "Untransformed or Similar")
    )
  }
}

model_comparison_df <- do.call(rbind, model_comparison_results)

# ── Loop 3: refit using best model per AIC ────────────────────────────────────
lmm_heatmap_results <- list()

for (i in seq_len(nrow(model_comparison_df))) {
  x            <- model_comparison_df$X[i]
  y            <- model_comparison_df$Y[i]
  better_model <- model_comparison_df$Better_Model[i]

  sub_df <- prep_sub_df(x, y, Shiseido_metadata)
  if (nrow(sub_df) < 5) next

  if (better_model == "Log-transformed") {
    sub_df$log_x <- log10(pmax(as.numeric(sub_df[[x]]), 1))
    sub_df$log_y <- log10(pmax(as.numeric(sub_df[[y]]), 1))
    model <- tryCatch(
      lmer(log_y ~ log_x + Face_site + (1|Subject_ID), data = sub_df),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    term <- "log_x"
  } else {
    model <- tryCatch(
      lmer(as.formula(paste(y, "~", x, "+ Face_site + (1|Subject_ID)")), data = sub_df),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    term <- x
  }

  if (is.null(model)) next
  effect_row <- broom.mixed::tidy(model) %>% filter(term == !!term)
  if (nrow(effect_row) != 1) next

  lmm_heatmap_results[[paste(x, y, sep = "_")]] <- data.frame(
    X = x, Y = y,
    Beta    = effect_row$estimate,
    p_value = effect_row$p.value
  )
}

lmm_df_heatmap <- finalize_lmm_df(lmm_heatmap_results)

# ── Shared heatmap theme ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
heatmap_theme <- theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x   = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.text     = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title    = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.ticks    = element_blank(),
    panel.border  = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    panel.grid    = element_blank()
  )

heatmap_fill <- scale_fill_gradient2(
  low      = "#4575b4",
  mid      = "white",
  high     = "#e08214",
  midpoint = 0,
  name     = expression(-sign(beta) * log[10](q))
)

# ── Heatmap helper ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
make_heatmap <- function(df, x_var, y_var, x_lab, y_lab, title) {
  ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[x_var]], y = .data[[y_var]], fill = signed_logq)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.9, height = 0.9) +
    geom_text(aes(label = stars), color = "black", size = 5,
              hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.8) +
    heatmap_fill +
    heatmap_theme +
    labs(x = x_lab, y = y_lab, title = title)
}

# ── Plot heatmaps ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
heatmap_final <- make_heatmap(
  lmm_df_heatmap,
  x_var = "X_label", y_var = "Y_label",
  x_lab = NULL,
  y_lab = "Amino Acids and NMFs (pmol/cm²)",
  title = "LMM Associations (Best Model Fit)"
)

heatmap_transposed <- make_heatmap(
  lmm_df_heatmap,
  x_var = "Y_label", y_var = "X_label",
  x_lab = "Amino Acids and NMFs (pmol/cm²)",
  y_lab = NULL,
  title = "Associations between skin biophysical properties and targeted metabolites"
)

print(heatmap_final)
print(heatmap_transposed)
```



#### METABOLOMICS 

```{r packages}
library(tidyverse)
library(mixOmics)
library(ggpubr)
library(vegan)
library(caret)
library(rstatix)
library(UpSetR)
library(homologueDiscoverer)
library(ggdensity)
library(cowplot)
library(readxl)
library(lmerTest)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(MassTools)
library(shiny)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(svglite)
library(Cairo)
```
```{r}
#Function for homologues analysis
plotAnnotatedStatic <- function(annotated, legend_setting = "bottom"){
  
  annotated <- mutate(annotated,
                      homologue_id = if_else(is.na(homologue_id), 0L, homologue_id),
                      homologue_id = as.factor(homologue_id))
  colourCount = length(unique(annotated$homologue_id))
  getPalette = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "Set1"))
  ncolor = length(unique(annotated$homologue_id))
  annotated <- arrange(annotated, desc(homologue_id))
  g <- ggplot(annotated, aes(group = homologue_id)) +
    geom_point(aes(x = rt, y = mz, color = homologue_id, size = homologue_id,
                   shape = homologue_id, alpha = homologue_id)) +
    geom_line(data = filter(annotated, homologue_id != 0),
              aes(x = rt, y = mz, group = homologue_id), alpha = 0.4, linewidth = 0.1) +
    ggtitle("Annotated Peak Table") +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c("black", getPalette(colourCount-1))) +
    scale_alpha_manual(values =  c(0.2, rep(0.85, times = ncolor))) +
    scale_size_manual(values = c(0.1, rep(1.5, times = ncolor))) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c(1, rep(19, times = ncolor))) +
    xlab("Retention Time (s)") +
    ylab("Mass to Charge Ratio") +
    theme(legend.position=legend_setting, text = element_text(family="mono"))
  return(g)
  
}
```


```{r}
#Load in Data 
feature_table <- read_csv("../data/metabolomics/Britta_Shiseido_FBMN_2_attempt-d80187a83bd44a49901c57d813265012-featuretable_reformated.csv")


metadata <- read.csv("../data/Shiseido_metadata.txt", header=TRUE, sep="\t", stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
metadata <- metadata[metadata$X.SampleID != "" & !is.na(metadata$X.SampleID), ]


#sample_order <- read.csv("../Data/metabolomics/Run3_10252024/Sequence_order_10262024.csv")

#with suspects
#annotations <- read.delim("")
#without suspects
#annotations <- read.delim("../data/metabolomics/d80187a83bd44a49901c57d813265012-merged_results_with_gnps.tsv")
#annotations from run Britta_Shiseido_FBMN_2_attempt3quant_SZ_MC_PD_05072025
annotations <- read.delim("../data/metabolomics/Britta_Shiseido_FBMN_2_attempt3quant_SZ_MC_PD_05072025-merged_results_with_gnps.tsv")
annotations$X.Scan. <- as.character(annotations$X.Scan.)


canopus <- read_tsv("../data/metabolomics/canopus_structure_summary.tsv")
canopus$featureId <- as.character(canopus$mappingFeatureId)

mapping_file <- read.delim("../data/metabolomics/gnps_metadata.tsv")

```


```{r}
duplicates_in_metadata <- metadata[metadata$X.SampleID %in% metadata$X.SampleID[duplicated(metadata$X.SampleID)], ]

```

```{r}

metadata_2 <- metadata %>% full_join(mapping_file, by = c("ID" = "Study_SubjectIdentifierAsRecorded"))

```
```{r}
metadata_with_runorder <- metadata_2 %>%
  mutate(Order = as.numeric(str_extract(filename, "(?<=_)[0-9]+(?=\\.mzXML)"))) %>%
  arrange(Order)

```



```{r}
# metadata_with_runorder$ATTRIBUTE_Curated_SampleType_Sub1 contains the sample type column
# Show rows where 'ATTRIBUTE_Curated_SampleType_Sub1' equals the target value
filtered_rows <- metadata_with_runorder %>%
  filter(ATTRIBUTE_Curated_SampleType_Sub1 == "blank_analysis")

# Print the full rows
print(filtered_rows)

```

```{r}
### Import exported dataframe
Shiseidodf <- read.csv("../data/Shiseidodfc.txt", header=TRUE, sep="\t", stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
```
```{r}
### Order Face_site
Shiseidodf$Face_site<-factor(Shiseidodf$Face_site, levels=c("Forehead", "Nose", "Cheek", "Temple","Chin","Ear","Neck"))
```
```{r}
metadata_with_runorder2 <- metadata_with_runorder
```

```{r}
# Merge only Face_site for matching X.SampleID in Shiseido_metadata
metadata_with_runorder <- merge(
  metadata_with_runorder,
  Shiseidodf[, c("X.SampleID", "Face_site")],
  by = "X.SampleID",
  all.x = TRUE  # ensures only SampleIDs present in Shiseido_metadata are kept
)
```

```{r}
sum(metadata_with_runorder$ATTRIBUTE_Curated_SampleType_Sub1 == "skin", na.rm = TRUE)
```


```{r}
sum(metadata_with_runorder$ATTRIBUTE_Curated_SampleType_Sub1 == "blank_analysis", na.rm = TRUE)
```
```{r}
sum(metadata_with_runorder$ATTRIBUTE_Curated_SampleType_Sub1 == "reference material_personalcareproduct", na.rm = TRUE)
```

```{r}
info_feature <- feature_table %>% dplyr::select(1:3,8)
colnames(info_feature) <- c("Feature", "mz", "RT", "Corr_ID")
info_feature$Feature <- as.character(info_feature$Feature)

canopus$mappingFeatureId <-as.character(canopus$mappingFeatureId)
info_feature_complete <- info_feature %>% 
  left_join(annotations, by = c("Feature" = "X.Scan.")) %>%
  dplyr::select(1:4,18,24) %>% 
  left_join(canopus %>% distinct(mappingFeatureId, .keep_all = TRUE), by = c("Feature" = "mappingFeatureId"))
```




```{r}
metadata_with_runorder$filename_2 <- metadata_with_runorder$filename

metadata_with_runorder$filename_2 <- gsub(".mzXML", "", metadata_with_runorder$filename_2)
```


```{r}
# Extract data table 
data <- feature_table %>% 
  column_to_rownames("row ID") %>% dplyr::select(contains("Peak")) %>% 
  t() %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% 
  arrange(SampleID) %>% distinct(SampleID, .keep_all = TRUE)

data$SampleID <- gsub(".mzXML Peak area", "", data$SampleID)


```

```{r}
metadata_with_runorder$Subject_ID <- sub("-.*", "", metadata_with_runorder$microbiome_ID)

metadata_with_runorder_clean <- metadata_with_runorder %>%
  filter(!is.na(Subject_ID), !is.na(sebum))
```


```{r}
# List of SampleIDs in `data` that are not found in metadata
missing_samples <- data$SampleID[!data$SampleID %in% metadata_with_runorder$filename_2]

# Print missing sample IDs
print(missing_samples)

```

```{r}
# Samples in metadata but not in data
missing_in_data <- metadata_with_runorder$filename_2[!metadata_with_runorder$filename_2 %in% data$SampleID]

# Print them
print(missing_in_data)

```

```{r}
metadata_with_runorder <- metadata_with_runorder %>%
  filter(!is.na(filename_2))

```
```{r}
# Create and bind new rows with filename_2 set, all other columns as NA
metadata_with_runorder <- bind_rows(
  metadata_with_runorder,
  tibble(filename_2 = missing_samples)
)

```

```{r}
metadata_with_runorder <- metadata_with_runorder %>%
  mutate(Order = as.numeric(str_extract(filename_2, "\\d+(?=\\s*$|\\.mzXML$)")))

```

```{r}
metadata_with_runorder <- metadata_with_runorder %>%
  mutate(Sample_Type2 = case_when(
    ATTRIBUTE_Curated_SampleType_Sub1 == "skin" ~ "samples",
    ATTRIBUTE_Curated_SampleType_Sub1 == "reference material_personalcareproduct" ~ "BP",
    ATTRIBUTE_Curated_SampleType_Sub1 == "blank_analysis" ~ "blank_swabs",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_  # set the rest to NA for now
  )) %>%
  mutate(Sample_Type2 = case_when(
    !is.na(Sample_Type2) ~ Sample_Type2,  # keep already assigned
    str_detect(filename_2, regex("QC", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "QC",
    str_detect(filename_2, regex("wash", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "wash",
    str_detect(filename_2, regex("blank", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "blank",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  ))
```

```{r}
data_final <- data
```


```{r}
# Calculate Total Ion Count (TIC)


data_TIC <- data.frame(TIC = rowSums(data_final %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID"))) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>%
  left_join(
    metadata_with_runorder %>% select(filename_2, Order, Subject_ID),
    by = c("SampleID" = "filename_2")
  )


```




```{r}

data_TIC2 <- data_TIC %>%
  filter(!str_detect(SampleID, regex("blank|wash|QC|emu|loit", ignore_case = TRUE)))

data_TIC %>%
  filter(!str_detect(SampleID, regex("blank|wash|QC|emu|loit", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  #left_join(metadata_with_runorder, by = c("SampleID" = "filename_2")) %>%
  mutate(SubjectNo = as.factor(Subject_ID)) %>%
  ggscatter(x = "Order", y = "TIC", color = "Subject_ID", add = "reg.line") +
  stat_cor()


```



```{r}
# Check sample type
sample_tic <-  data_TIC %>% dplyr::filter(!(str_detect(SampleID, regex("blank|wash|QC|emu|loit", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>% summarise(mean(TIC))
qc_tic <- data_TIC %>%   dplyr::filter(str_detect(SampleID, "QC") | str_detect(SampleID, regex("QC", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>% summarise(mean(TIC))

#blank swabs
blank_swabs_ids <- metadata_with_runorder %>%
  filter(Sample_Type2 == "blank_swabs") %>%
  pull(filename_2)

blank_swabs_tic <- data_TIC %>%
  filter(SampleID %in% blank_swabs_ids) %>%
  summarise(mean_TIC = mean(TIC, na.rm = TRUE))

#blank samples 

blank_ids <- metadata_with_runorder %>%
  filter(Sample_Type2 == "blank") %>%
  pull(filename_2)

blank_tic <- data_TIC %>%
  filter(SampleID %in% blank_ids) %>%
  summarise(mean_TIC = mean(TIC, na.rm = TRUE))

#BP 

BP_ids <- metadata_with_runorder %>%
  filter(Sample_Type2 == "BP") %>%
  pull(filename_2)

BP_tic <- data_TIC %>%
  filter(SampleID %in% BP_ids) %>%
  summarise(mean_TIC = mean(TIC, na.rm = TRUE))

#wash samples 

wash_ids <- metadata_with_runorder %>%
  filter(Sample_Type2 == "wash") %>%
  pull(filename_2)

wash_tic <- data_TIC %>%
  filter(SampleID %in% wash_ids) %>%
  summarise(mean_TIC = mean(TIC, na.rm = TRUE))



ratio_tic_sb <- sample_tic/blank_tic
ratio_tic_6p <- sample_tic/qc_tic
ratio_tic_swab <- sample_tic/blank_swabs_tic
ratio_tic_bp <- sample_tic/BP_tic

```

```{r}
a0 <- data_TIC %>% dplyr::filter(!(str_detect(SampleID, regex("blank|wash|QC|emu|loit", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>% 
  ggscatter("Order", "TIC", add = "reg.line") +
  stat_cor() +ylim(0, 1e7) + ggtitle("TIC over Time for Samples")
```




```{r}
# Check internal standard and remove sample where there was a shift
fbmn_IS <- annotations %>% dplyr::filter(str_detect(Compound_Name, regex("sulf", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>% 
  distinct(X.Scan., .keep_all = TRUE) %>% dplyr::filter(Organism != "BILELIB19")
```
#Sulfadimethoxine
```{r}
#sulfadimethoxine was the one that was used according to Jasmine 
#X.Scan. 642
table_IS <- data_final %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% t() %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("ID") %>% 
  dplyr::filter(ID %in% fbmn_IS$X.Scan.) %>% column_to_rownames("ID") %>% t() %>% as.data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column("filename") %>% left_join(metadata_with_runorder, by = c("filename" = "filename_2")) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!(str_detect(filename, regex("blank|wash|QC|emu|loit", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>%
  dplyr::select(filename, `642`, Order, filename)
```

```{r}
colnames(table_IS)[2] <- "Sulfadimethoxine"

sulfadimethoxine <-table_IS %>% ggscatter(x = "Order", y = "Sulfadimethoxine", add = c("reg.line")) +
  stat_cor() + ylim(0, 5e4)
```
```{r}
ggsave("./Figures/Metabolomics/QC/Sulfadimethoxine.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in")
```

```{r}
table_IS %>% ggbarplot(x = "Order", y = "Sulfadimethoxine", xlab = "Run Order", 
                       ylab = "Peak Area sulfadimethoxine", title = "Internal Standard Acquisition") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = mean(table_IS$Sulfadimethoxine, na.rm = TRUE), linetype = "dashed", color = "blue")

cv_is <- sd(table_IS$Sulfadimethoxine)/mean(table_IS$Sulfadimethoxine)

#CV is 18,18452% 
#CV<30% is considered as good
```
```{r}
#sulfadimethoxine was the one that was used according to Jasmine 
#X.Scan. 222
table_IS <- data_final %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% t() %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("ID") %>% 
  dplyr::filter(ID %in% fbmn_IS$X.Scan.) %>% column_to_rownames("ID") %>% t() %>% as.data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column("filename") %>% left_join(metadata_with_runorder, by = c("filename" = "filename_2")) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!(str_detect(filename, regex("blank|wash|QC|emu|loit", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>%
  dplyr::select(filename, `222`, Order, filename)
```

```{r}
colnames(table_IS)[2] <- "Sulfachloropyridazine"

table_IS %>% ggscatter(x = "Order", y = "Sulfachloropyridazine", add = c("reg.line")) +
  stat_cor() + ylim(0, 5e3)
```
```{r}
table_IS %>% ggbarplot(x = "Order", y = "Sulfachloropyridazine", xlab = "Run Order", 
                       ylab = "Peak Area sulfachloropyridazine", title = "Internal Standard Acquisition") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = mean(table_IS$Sulfadimethoxine, na.rm = TRUE), linetype = "dashed", color = "blue")

cv_is <- sd(table_IS$Sulfachloropyridazine)/mean(table_IS$Sulfachloropyridazine)

#CV is 31,4125144% 
#CV<30% is considered as good
```



```{r}
# Check features in blanks, blank swabs, qc, and BP with filtering out the outliers
data_blank <- data_final %>%
  semi_join(
    metadata_with_runorder %>% filter(Sample_Type2 == "blank"),
    by = c("SampleID" = "filename_2")
  )

data_qc <- data_final %>%
  semi_join(
    metadata_with_runorder %>% filter(Sample_Type2 == "QC"),
    by = c("SampleID" = "filename_2")
  )

data_swabs <- data_final %>%
  semi_join(
    metadata_with_runorder %>% filter(Sample_Type2 == "blank_swabs"),
    by = c("SampleID" = "filename_2")
  )

data_BP <- data_final %>%
  semi_join(
    metadata_with_runorder %>% filter(Sample_Type2 == "BP"),
    by = c("SampleID" = "filename_2")
  )

data_skin <- data_final %>%
  semi_join(
    metadata_with_runorder %>% filter(Sample_Type2 == "samples"),
    by = c("SampleID" = "filename_2")
  )
```


```{r}
# Blanks
blanks_feature_info <- data.frame(Feature = colnames(data_blank)[-1],
                                  Mean_blank = data_blank %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% colMeans(), 
                                  SD_blank =  data_blank %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% apply(2, sd)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(CV_blank = SD_blank/Mean_blank) %>% left_join(annotations, by = c("Feature" = "X.Scan.")) %>% 
  left_join(info_feature) %>% dplyr::select(Feature, mz, RT, Compound_Name, SpectrumID, 
                                            Precursor_MZ, Mean_blank, SD_blank, CV_blank) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Mean_blank > 0) %>% arrange(desc(Mean_blank))

```




```{r}
# Six mix
qc_feature_info <- data.frame(Feature = colnames(data_qc)[-1],
                                  Mean_qc = data_qc %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% colMeans(), 
                                  SD_qc = data_qc %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% apply(2, sd)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(CV_qc = SD_qc/Mean_qc) %>% left_join(annotations, by = c("Feature" = "X.Scan.")) %>% 
  left_join(info_feature) %>% dplyr::select(Feature, mz, RT, Compound_Name, SpectrumID, 
                                            Precursor_MZ, Mean_qc, SD_qc, CV_qc) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Mean_qc > 0) %>% arrange(desc(Mean_qc))
```
```{r}
# CTLs
blankswabs_feature_info <- data.frame(Feature = colnames(data_swabs)[-1],
                                 Mean_ctl = data_swabs %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% colMeans(), 
                                 SD_ctl =  data_swabs %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% apply(2, sd)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(CV_ctl = SD_ctl/Mean_ctl) %>% left_join(annotations, by = c("Feature" = "X.Scan.")) %>% 
  left_join(info_feature) %>% dplyr::select(Feature, mz, RT, Compound_Name, SpectrumID, 
                                            Precursor_MZ, Mean_ctl, SD_ctl, CV_ctl) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Mean_ctl > 0) %>% arrange(desc(Mean_ctl))
```



```{r}
# BP
BP_feature_info <- data.frame(Feature = colnames(data_BP)[-1],
                                 Mean_BP = data_BP %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% colMeans(), 
                                 SD_BP =  data_BP %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% apply(2, sd)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(CV_BP = SD_BP/Mean_BP) %>% left_join(annotations, by = c("Feature" = "X.Scan.")) %>% 
  left_join(info_feature) %>% dplyr::select(Feature, mz, RT, Compound_Name, SpectrumID, 
                                            Precursor_MZ, Mean_BP, SD_BP, CV_BP) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Mean_BP > 0) %>% arrange(desc(Mean_BP))

```


```{r}
# Skin
skin_feature_info <- data.frame(Feature = colnames(data_skin)[-1],
                                 Mean_skin = data_skin %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% colMeans(), 
                                 SD_skin =  data_skin %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% apply(2, sd)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(CV_skin = SD_skin/Mean_skin) %>% left_join(annotations, by = c("Feature" = "X.Scan.")) %>% 
  left_join(info_feature) %>% dplyr::select(Feature, mz, RT, Compound_Name, SpectrumID, 
                                            Precursor_MZ, Mean_skin, SD_skin, CV_skin) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Mean_skin > 0) %>% arrange(desc(Mean_skin))
```



```{r}
# Features to be removed Skin/Blank < 5 or 10
feature_to_remove <- blanks_feature_info %>% left_join(skin_feature_info) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Mean_blank > 0) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(skin_Blank = Mean_skin/Mean_blank) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(skin_Blank < 5 | is.na(skin_Blank))

#42 features that need to be removed
```
```{r}
# Data with blank removal
data_clean <- data_final %>% dplyr::select(-c(feature_to_remove$Feature)) %>%
  column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>%
  select_if(~sum(.) != 0) %>% rownames_to_column("SampleID")
```

```{r}
# Features to be removed Skin/QCmix < 5 or 10 
feature_to_remove_mix <- qc_feature_info %>% left_join(skin_feature_info) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Mean_qc > 0) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(Skin_Mix = Mean_skin/Mean_qc) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Skin_Mix < 5 | is.na(Skin_Mix)) %>% dplyr::filter(!(Feature %in% feature_to_remove$Feature))

#28 features 
```

```{r}
# Data with QC mix removal
data_clean2 <- data_clean %>% dplyr::select(-c(feature_to_remove_mix$Feature))

```
```{r}
# Features to be removed Skin/Skin_swabs < 5 or 10 
feature_to_remove_blankswabs <- blankswabs_feature_info %>% left_join(skin_feature_info) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Mean_ctl > 0) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(Skin_CTL = Mean_skin/Mean_ctl) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Skin_CTL < 5 | is.na(Skin_CTL)) %>% dplyr::filter(!(Feature %in% feature_to_remove_mix$Feature))  %>%  dplyr::filter(!(Feature %in% feature_to_remove$Feature)) #%>% dplyr::filter(!(Feature %in% feature_to_remove_BP$Feature))
```


```{r}
# Data with removal of blank swabs
data_clean3 <- data_clean2 %>% dplyr::select(-c(feature_to_remove_blankswabs$Feature))


```

```{r}
# Features to be removed Skin/BP < 5 or 10 
feature_to_remove_BP <- BP_feature_info %>% left_join(skin_feature_info) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Mean_BP > 0) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(Skin_BP = Mean_skin/Mean_BP) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Skin_BP < 5 | is.na(Skin_BP)) %>% dplyr::filter(!(Feature %in% feature_to_remove_mix$Feature))  %>%  dplyr::filter(!(Feature %in% feature_to_remove$Feature)) %>% dplyr::filter(!(Feature %in% feature_to_remove_blankswabs$Feature))

#868
```

```{r}
# Data with BP  removal
data_clean4 <- data_clean3 %>% dplyr::select(-c(feature_to_remove_BP$Feature))

```


```{r}
library(dplyr)

# Add label for each group of features
feature_to_remove_labeled <- feature_to_remove %>%
  mutate(Contaminant_Source = "blank")

feature_to_remove_mix_labeled <- feature_to_remove_mix %>%
  mutate(Contaminant_Source = "QC_mix")

feature_to_remove_blankswabs_labeled <- feature_to_remove_blankswabs %>%
  mutate(Contaminant_Source = "blank_swabs")

feature_to_remove_BP_labeled <- feature_to_remove_BP %>%
  mutate(Contaminant_Source = "BP")

```

```{r}
# Combine all into one table
features_to_remove_all <- bind_rows(
  feature_to_remove_labeled,
  feature_to_remove_mix_labeled,
  feature_to_remove_blankswabs_labeled,
  feature_to_remove_BP_labeled
) %>%
  distinct(Feature, Contaminant_Source)  # In case a feature appeared in multiple (rare, but safe to deduplicate)

```
```{r}
# Find features that remained (after all cleaning)
remaining_features <- colnames(data_clean4)
remaining_features <- remaining_features[remaining_features != "SampleID"]  # Remove SampleID column if still present

# Create a dataframe for skin features
skin_features_df <- data.frame(
  Feature = remaining_features,
  Contaminant_Source = "skin"
)

```

```{r}
# Combine removed features (blanks, QC mix, blank swabs, BP) and remaining skin features
final_feature_source_table <- bind_rows(
  features_to_remove_all,
  skin_features_df
)

```

```{r}
# Define the color palette for six Sample_Type categories
sample_type_colors <- c("samples" = "#daa600",  # Blue
                        "blank" = "#2ca25f",  # Orange
                        "BP" = "#c00001",
                        "QC" = "#bcbddc",  # Red
                        "blank_swabs" = "#247cb9",  # Purple
                        "wash" = "#8c564b")  # Brown
```


```{r}
# PCA raw data before removing the features
PCA_raw <- mixOmics::pca(data_final %>% select_at(vars(-one_of(nearZeroVar(., names = TRUE)))) %>%
                           column_to_rownames("SampleID"), ncomp = 2, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)
PCA_raw_scores <- data.frame(PCA_raw$variates$X) %>% rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% left_join(metadata_with_runorder, by = c("SampleID" = "filename_2"))

i <- "Sample_Type2"

PCA_raw_plot <- PCA_raw_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = i, alpha = 0.6,
            title = paste("PCA of Raw Metabolomics Data by", i, sep = " "),
            xlab = paste("PC1 (", round(PCA_raw$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("PC2 (", round(PCA_raw$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""),
            ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  geom_point(data = PCA_raw_scores %>% group_by((!!sym(i))) %>% 
               summarise_at(vars(matches("PC")), mean), aes(PC1, PC2, color = (!!sym(i))), size = 4, shape = 8) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10), axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 4)) + coord_fixed() +
  scale_color_manual(values = sample_type_colors)

```

```{r}
# 3. Save the full layout
ggsave("../figures/metabolomics/qc/PCA_raw_plot_SampleType2.png",
       plot = PCA_raw_plot,
```
