```{r}
       width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 300)

ggsave("../figures/metabolomics/qc/PCA_raw_plot_SampleType2.svg",
       plot = PCA_raw_plot,
       width = 5, height = 5)
```

```{r}
data_final_filtered <- data_final %>%
  column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>%
  filter(rowSums(.) > 0)
```


```{r}
# Apply rclr
data_final_clr <- decostand(data_final_filtered, method = "rclr")
```

```{r}
PCA_raw <- mixOmics::pca(data_final_clr, ncomp = 2, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)
PCA_raw_scores <- data.frame(PCA_raw$variates$X) %>% rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% left_join(metadata_with_runorder, by = c("SampleID" = "filename_2"))

i <- "Sample_Type2"

PCA_raw_plot <- PCA_raw_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = i, alpha = 0.6,
            title = paste("PCA of rCLR-Transformed Metabolomics Data by", i, sep = " "),
            xlab = paste("PC1 (", round(PCA_raw$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("PC2 (", round(PCA_raw$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""),
            ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  geom_point(data = PCA_raw_scores %>% group_by((!!sym(i))) %>% 
               summarise_at(vars(matches("PC")), mean), aes(PC1, PC2, color = (!!sym(i))), size = 4, shape = 8) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10), axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 4)) + coord_fixed() +
  scale_color_manual(values = sample_type_colors)
```

```{r}
# 3. Save the full layout
ggsave("../figures/metabolomics/qc/PCA_raw_plot_SampleType2_rclr.png",
       plot = PCA_raw_plot,
       width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 300)

ggsave("../figures/metabolomics/qc/PCA_raw_plot_SampleType2_rclr.svg",
       plot = PCA_raw_plot,
       width = 5, height = 5)
```



```{r}
# Remove rows with all zeros BEFORE rclr
data_filtered <- data_clean4 %>%
  column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>%
  filter(rowSums(.) > 0)

# Apply rclr
data_clean_4_clr <- decostand(data_filtered, method = "rclr")
```


```{r}
# PCA
PCA_whole <- mixOmics::pca(data_clean_4_clr, ncomp = 2, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)
PCA_whole_scores <- data.frame(PCA_whole$variates$X) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID")  %>% left_join(metadata_with_runorder, by = c("SampleID" = "filename_2"))
#PCA_whole_scores <- data.frame(PCA_whole$variates$X) %>% rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% left_join(metadata_final)
i <- "Sample_Type2"

PCA_plot <- PCA_whole_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = i, alpha = 0.6,
            title = paste("PCA - Skin Metabolome - rclr transformed data"),
            xlab = paste("PC1 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("PC2 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""),
            ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  geom_point(data = PCA_whole_scores %>% group_by((!!sym(i))) %>% 
               summarise_at(vars(matches("PC")), mean), aes(PC1, PC2, color = (!!sym(i))), size = 4, shape = 8) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10), axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 4)) + coord_fixed()  +
  scale_color_manual(values = sample_type_colors)
```


```{r}
# Remove plastic contamination
feature_check <- info_feature %>% dplyr::select(1:3) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Feature %in% colnames(data_clean4)) %>% as_tibble()
colnames(feature_check) <- c("peak_id", "mz", "rt")
feature_check$mz <- as.double(feature_check$mz)
feature_check$rt <- as.double(feature_check$rt)
```

```{r}
# for 1 CTL sample 
feature_pool <- data_clean4 %>% 
  dplyr::filter(SampleID == "blank_GG11_01_1689") %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>%
  t() %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("peak_id")

feature_check_pool <- feature_check %>% left_join(feature_pool)

feature_check_pool$peak_id <- as.integer(feature_check_pool$peak_id)
colnames(feature_check_pool)[4] <- "intensity"
```

```{r}
# Remove PEGs
peak_table_PEG <- detectHomologues(feature_check_pool, mz_steps = c(44.02628),
                                   rt_min = 0.1, rt_max = 100, ppm_tolerance = 10, 
                                   min_series_length = 5, search_mode = "targeted", 
                                   step_mode = "increment", verbose = TRUE)

plotAnnotatedStatic(peak_table_PEG)
```

```{r}

sdb <- sdbCreate(peak_table_PEG, sample_origin = "data")


```

```{r}
# Remove untargeted 
peak_table_untargeted <- detectHomologues(feature_check_pool, mz_min = 10, mz_max = 50, 
                                          rt_min = 0.5, rt_max = 100, ppm_tolerance = 5, 
                                          min_series_length = 5, search_mode = "untargeted", 
                                          step_mode = "increment", verbose = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#if running targeted and untargeted 
# Combine tables
overlapping_ids <- sdbCheckContained(sdb, peak_table_untargeted, ppm_tolerance = 0.5, rt_tolerance = 0.5)
sdb <- sdbPush(sdb, filter(peak_table_untargeted, !(homologue_id %in% overlapping_ids)))
```

```{r}
sdb$sample_peak_id <- as.character(sdb$sample_peak_id)
features_contaminat <- info_feature_complete %>% dplyr::filter(Feature %in% sdb$sample_peak_id)

data_clean5 <- data_clean4 %>% dplyr::select(-c(sdb$sample_peak_id))

```


```{r}
# PCA
PCA_raw <- mixOmics::pca(data_clean5 %>% select_at(vars(-one_of(nearZeroVar(., names = TRUE)))) %>%
                           column_to_rownames("SampleID"), ncomp = 2, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)
PCA_raw_scores <- data.frame(PCA_raw$variates$X) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% left_join(metadata_with_runorder, by = c("SampleID" = "filename_2"))

i <- "Sample_Type2"

PCA_raw_plot <- PCA_raw_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = i, alpha = 0.6,
            title = paste("PCA - Skin Metabolome", i, sep = " "),
            xlab = paste("PC1 (", round(PCA_raw$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("PC2 (", round(PCA_raw$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""),
            ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  geom_point(data = PCA_raw_scores %>% group_by((!!sym(i))) %>% 
               summarise_at(vars(matches("PC")), mean), aes(PC1, PC2, color = (!!sym(i))), size = 4, shape = 8) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10), axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 4)) + coord_fixed()+
  scale_color_manual(values = sample_type_colors)

```

```{r}
# Keep only samples
data_sample <- data_clean5 %>% 
   dplyr::filter(!(str_detect(SampleID, regex("blank|wash|QC|emu|loit", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>% 
  column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>%
  filter(rowSums(.) > 0)%>%  
  select_at(vars(-one_of(nearZeroVar(., names = TRUE)))) %>% rownames_to_column("SampleID") 
```

```{r}
# after filtering out the contaminant featuers
filtered_data_sample_skin_feature_info <- data.frame(Feature = colnames(data_sample)[-1]) %>% left_join(annotations, by = c("Feature" = "X.Scan.")) %>% 
  left_join(info_feature) %>% dplyr::select(Feature, mz, RT, Compound_Name, SpectrumID) 
```



```{r}
fill_colors <- c(
  "Forehead" = "#ffc65e",   # warm amber
  "Nose"     = "#5693c7",   # soft blue
  "Cheek"    = "#8ccd87",   # light green
  "Ear"      = "#9dcfcf",   # muted teal (cooler, pairs with Nose & Cheek)
  "Temple"   = "#f29d1e",   # bold warm orange (near Forehead)
  "Chin"     = "#bfa6d0",   # lavender (softer contrast after orange)
  "Neck"     = "#d3d3d3"    # neutral gray (least visually dominant, good for last)
)

border_colors <- c(
  "Forehead" = "#e0a846",  # darker amber
  "Nose"     = "#3a6b99",  # darker blue
  "Cheek"    = "#4a7a4f",  # deeper green
  "Ear"      = "#6ca5a5",  # darker teal
  "Temple"   = "#c97e0f",  # deeper warm orange
  "Chin"     = "#9989ac",  # deeper lavender
  "Neck"     = "#a9a9a9"   # medium gray
)
```


```{r}
data_sample_clr <- decostand(data_sample %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID"), method = "rclr")
```
```{r}
# PCA
PCA_whole <- mixOmics::pca(data_sample_clr, ncomp = 2, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)
PCA_whole_scores <- data.frame(PCA_whole$variates$X) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% left_join(metadata_with_runorder, by = c("SampleID" = "filename_2"))
PCA_whole_scores$Face_site <- factor(PCA_whole_scores$Face_site, levels=c("Forehead", "Nose", "Cheek", "Temple","Chin","Ear","Neck"))

i <- "Face_site"


```



```{r}
PCA_plot_Face_site <- PCA_whole_scores %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, fill = !!sym(i), color = !!sym(i))) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 0.6, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_point(
    data = PCA_whole_scores %>%
      group_by((!!sym(i))) %>%
      summarise(across(matches("PC"), mean)),
    aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, fill = !!sym(i), color = !!sym(i)),
    shape = 8, size = 4, inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Face site", values = fill_colors) +  # set title here
  scale_color_manual(name = "Face site", values = border_colors) +  # match title
  labs(
    title = "PCA of RCLR-Transformed Metabolite Features by Face Site",
    x = paste0("PC1 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, 1), "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, 1), "%)")
  ) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15), 
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11)
  )

```


```{r}
# PERMANOVA
dist_metabolites <- vegdist(data_sample_clr, method = "euclidean")
disper_donor <- betadisper(dist_metabolites, PCA_whole_scores$Subject_ID)

#significant variation between the groups
anova(disper_donor)
permanova <- adonis2(dist_metabolites ~ PCA_whole_scores$Subject_ID + PCA_whole_scores$Face_site, PCA_whole_scores, na.action = na.omit, by="margin")
```

# plot with Permanova

```{r}
face_row <- permanova[2, ]
r2 <- round(face_row$R2 * 100, 1)
f_val <- round(face_row$F, 2)
p_val <- format(face_row$`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3, scientific = TRUE)

label_text <- paste0("PERMANOVA\nR² = ", r2, "%\nF = ", f_val, "\np = ", p_val)

```

```{r}
PCA_plot_Face_site <- PCA_whole_scores %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, fill = !!sym(i), color = !!sym(i))) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 0.6, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_point(
    data = PCA_whole_scores %>%
      group_by((!!sym(i))) %>%
      summarise(across(matches("PC"), mean)),
    aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, fill = !!sym(i), color = !!sym(i)),
    shape = 8, size = 4, inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Face site", values = fill_colors) +  # set title here
  scale_color_manual(name = "Face site", values = border_colors) +  # match title
  labs(
    title = "PCA of RCLR-Transformed Untargeted Metabolite Features by Face Site", #PCA of RCLR-Transformed Metabolite Features by Face Site
    x = paste0("PC1 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, 1), "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, 1), "%)")
  ) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15), 
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11)
  )+ annotate("text", 
    x = Inf, y = Inf,
    label = label_text,
    hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.2, size = 3.8
  )


```

# leave out Neck, Chin, Temple, Ear ONLY FACE NOSE CHEEK
```{r}
# First join metadata and filter to include only relevant face sites
metadata_filtered <- metadata_with_runorder %>%
  filter(Face_site %in% c("Forehead", "Nose", "Cheek"))

# Then subset the data_sample accordingly
data_sample_filtered <- data_sample %>%
  filter(SampleID %in% metadata_filtered$filename_2)

# CLR transformation on filtered data
data_sample_clr <- decostand(data_sample_filtered %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID"), method = "rclr")

# Run PCA
PCA_whole <- mixOmics::pca(data_sample_clr, ncomp = 2, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)

# Join PCA scores with filtered metadata
PCA_whole_scores <- data.frame(PCA_whole$variates$X) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>%
  left_join(metadata_filtered, by = c("SampleID" = "filename_2"))

# Set Face_site as ordered factor
PCA_whole_scores$Face_site <- factor(PCA_whole_scores$Face_site, levels = c("Forehead", "Nose", "Cheek"))

i <- "Face_site"


```


```{r}
PCA_plot_Face_site <- PCA_whole_scores %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, fill = !!sym(i), color = !!sym(i))) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 0.6, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_point(
    data = PCA_whole_scores %>%
      group_by((!!sym(i))) %>%
      summarise(across(matches("PC"), mean)),
    aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, fill = !!sym(i), color = !!sym(i)),
    shape = 8, size = 4, inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Face site", values = fill_colors) +  # set title here
  scale_color_manual(name = "Face site", values = border_colors) +  # match title
  labs(
    title = "PCA of RCLR-Transformed Metabolite Features by Face Site",
    x = paste0("PC1 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, 1), "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, 1), "%)")
  ) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15), 
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11)
  )

```

```{r}
# PERMANOVA
dist_metabolites <- vegdist(data_sample_clr, method = "euclidean")
disper_donor <- betadisper(dist_metabolites, PCA_whole_scores$Subject_ID)

#significant variation between the groups
anova(disper_donor)
permanova <- adonis2(dist_metabolites ~ PCA_whole_scores$Subject_ID + PCA_whole_scores$Face_site, PCA_whole_scores, na.action = na.omit, by="margin")
```

# plot with Permanova

```{r}
face_row <- permanova[2, ]
r2 <- round(face_row$R2 * 100, 1)
f_val <- round(face_row$F, 2)
p_val <- format(face_row$`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3, scientific = TRUE)

label_text <- paste0("PERMANOVA\nR² = ", r2, "%\nF = ", f_val, "\np = ", p_val)

```

```{r}
# 1. Create named vector for labels with counts
# 1. Create named vector for legend labels with Face_site as name and proper label
face_site_counts_df <- PCA_whole_scores %>%
  filter(!is.na(!!sym(i))) %>%
  count(face_site = !!sym(i)) %>%
  mutate(label = paste0(face_site, " (n = ", n, ")"))

# 2. Create a named vector: names = face_site, values = label
face_site_labels <- setNames(face_site_counts_df$label, face_site_counts_df$face_site)


PCA_whole_scores[[i]] <- factor(PCA_whole_scores[[i]], levels = names(face_site_labels))
# 3. Now update the plot with manual legend labels
PCA_plot_Face_site <- PCA_whole_scores %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, fill = !!sym(i), color = !!sym(i))) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 0.6, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_point(
    data = PCA_whole_scores %>%
      group_by((!!sym(i))) %>%
      summarise(across(matches("PC"), mean), .groups = "drop"),
    aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, fill = !!sym(i), color = !!sym(i)),
    shape = 8, size = 4, inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Face site",
    values = fill_colors,
    labels = face_site_labels
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Face site",
    values = border_colors,
    labels = face_site_labels
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "PCA of RCLR-Transformed Untargeted Metabolite Features by Face Site",
    x = paste0("PC1 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, 1), "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, 1), "%)")
  ) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15), 
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11)
  ) +
  annotate("text", 
    x = Inf, y = Inf,
    label = label_text,
    hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.2, size = 3.8
  )

```


```{r}

i <- "Subject_ID"  # change coloring to Subject_ID

PCA_plot_subject <- PCA_whole_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = i, alpha = 0.6,
            title = "PCA of RCLR-Transformed Metabolite Features by Subject",
            xlab = paste("PC1 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, digits = 1), "%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("PC2 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, digits = 1), "%)", sep = ""),
            ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  geom_point(data = PCA_whole_scores %>%
               group_by((!!sym(i))) %>%
               summarise(across(matches("PC"), mean)), 
             aes(PC1, PC2, color = (!!sym(i))), size = 4, shape = 8) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 15), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12)) +
  coord_fixed() + scale_color_viridis_d(option = "turbo")  # vibrant and high-contrast


```

```{r}
library(ggrepel)

i <- "Subject_ID"

PCA_plot_subject <- ggplot(PCA_whole_scores, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = !!sym(i), group = !!sym(i))) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_path(alpha = 0.5, linewidth = 0.6) +  # lines connecting points from same subject
  geom_text_repel(
    data = PCA_whole_scores %>%
      group_by((!!sym(i))) %>%
      summarise(across(c(PC1, PC2), mean), .groups = "drop"),
    aes(label = !!sym(i), x = PC1, y = PC2, color = !!sym(i)),
    size = 3, show.legend = FALSE, max.overlaps = Inf
  ) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "turbo") +
  coord_fixed() +
  labs(
    title = "PCA of RCLR-Transformed Metabolites by Subject",
    x = paste0("PC1 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[1] * 100, 1), "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[2] * 100, 1), "%)")
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

```

```{r}
# 3. Save the full layout
ggsave("../figures/supplementary/suppl_fig10.png",
       plot = PCA_plot_subject,
       width = 9, height = 9, dpi = 300)

ggsave("../figures/supplementary/suppl_fig10.svg",
       plot = PCA_plot_subject,
       width = 9, height = 9)
```



```{r}
q <- quantile(metadata_with_runorder$sebum, probs = c(0.25, 0.75), na.rm = TRUE)
low_thresh <- q[1]
high_thresh <- q[2]

# 2. Assign sebum groups
metadata_with_runorder <- metadata_with_runorder %>%
  mutate(sebum_group = case_when(
    sebum < low_thresh ~ "low",
    sebum >= low_thresh & sebum <= high_thresh ~ "medium",
    sebum > high_thresh ~ "high"
  ))

```



```{r}
# RCLR transformation
data_sample_clr <- decostand(data_sample %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID"), method = "rclr")
```

```{r}
# PCA
PCA_whole <- mixOmics::pca(data_sample_clr, ncomp = 2, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)
PCA_whole_scores <- data.frame(PCA_whole$variates$X) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% left_join(metadata_with_runorder, by = c("SampleID" = "filename_2"))

```

```{r}
# Example thresholds based on quantiles
q <- quantile(metadata_with_runorder$sebum, probs = c(0.25, 0.75), na.rm = TRUE)
low_thresh <- round(q[1], 1)
high_thresh <- round(q[2], 1)

# Set factor levels manually so Low, Medium, High appear in the correct order
PCA_whole_scores$sebum_group <- factor(PCA_whole_scores$sebum_group, 
                                       levels = c("low", "medium", "high"))

# Set i
i <- "sebum_group"

# Create PCA plot
PCA_plot_sebum <- PCA_whole_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = i, alpha = 0.6,
            title = "PCA of RCLR-Transformed Metabolite Features by Sebum Level",
            xlab = paste("PC1 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, 1), "%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("PC2 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, 1), "%)", sep = ""),
            ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  
  geom_point(data = PCA_whole_scores %>%
               group_by((!!sym(i))) %>%
               summarise(across(matches("PC"), mean)), 
             aes(PC1, PC2, color = (!!sym(i))), size = 4, shape = 8) +
  
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Sebum Group",
    values = c("low" = "#4575b4", "medium" = "#fee0b6", "high" = "#e08214"),
    labels = c(
      low = paste0("Low (< ", low_thresh, " µg/cm²)"),
      medium = paste0("Medium (", low_thresh, "–", high_thresh, " µg/cm²)"),
      high = paste0("High (> ", high_thresh, " µg/cm²)")
    )
  ) +
  
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 15), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 11)) +
  
  coord_fixed()

```




```{r}
# PERMANOVA
dist_metabolites <- vegdist(data_sample_clr, method = "euclidean")
disper_donor <- betadisper(dist_metabolites, PCA_whole_scores$Subject_ID)

#significant variation between the groups
anova(disper_donor)
permanova_sebumgroup <- adonis2(dist_metabolites ~ PCA_whole_scores$Subject_ID + PCA_whole_scores$sebum_group, PCA_whole_scores, na.action = na.omit, by="margin")
```


```{r}
sebum_row <- permanova_sebumgroup[2, ]
r2 <- round(sebum_row$R2 * 100, 1)
f_val <- round(sebum_row$F, 2)
p_val <- format(sebum_row$`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3, scientific = TRUE)

label_text <- paste0("PERMANOVA\nR² = ", r2, "%\nF = ", f_val, "\np = ", p_val)

```

#Plot with Permanova

```{r}
# Example thresholds based on quantiles
q <- quantile(metadata_with_runorder$sebum, probs = c(0.25, 0.75), na.rm = TRUE)
low_thresh <- round(q[1], 1)
high_thresh <- round(q[2], 1)

# Set factor levels manually so Low, Medium, High appear in the correct order
PCA_whole_scores$sebum_group <- factor(PCA_whole_scores$sebum_group, 
                                       levels = c("low", "medium", "high"))

# Set i
i <- "sebum_group"

# Create PCA plot
PCA_plot_sebum <- PCA_whole_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = i, alpha = 0.6,
            title = "PCA of RCLR-Transformed Untargeted Metabolite Features by Sebum Level", #"PCA of RCLR-Transformed Metabolite Features by Sebum Level"
            xlab = paste("PC1 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, 1), "%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("PC2 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, 1), "%)", sep = ""),
            ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  
  geom_point(data = PCA_whole_scores %>%
               group_by((!!sym(i))) %>%
               summarise(across(matches("PC"), mean)), 
             aes(PC1, PC2, color = (!!sym(i))), size = 4, shape = 8) +
  
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Sebum Group",
    values = c("low" = "#4575b4", "medium" = "#fee0b6", "high" = "#e08214"),
    labels = c(
      low = paste0("Low (< ", low_thresh, " µg/cm²)"),
      medium = paste0("Medium (", low_thresh, "–", high_thresh, " µg/cm²)"),
      high = paste0("High (> ", high_thresh, " µg/cm²)")
    )
  ) +
  
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 15), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 11)) +
  
  coord_fixed()+ annotate("text", 
    x = Inf, y = Inf,
    label = label_text,
    hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.2, size = 3.8
  )

```

#including counts per group

```{r}
# 2. Create legend labels with n + thresholds
sebum_group_counts_df <- PCA_whole_scores %>%
  filter(!is.na(sebum_group)) %>%
  count(sebum_group) %>%
  mutate(
    label = case_when(
      sebum_group == "low" ~ paste0("Low (< ", low_thresh, " µg/cm², n = ", n, ")"),
      sebum_group == "medium" ~ paste0("Medium (", low_thresh, "–", high_thresh, " µg/cm², n = ", n, ")"),
      sebum_group == "high" ~ paste0("High (> ", high_thresh, " µg/cm², n = ", n, ")"),
      TRUE ~ as.character(sebum_group)
    )
  )

# 3. Create named vector for legend
sebum_group_labels <- setNames(sebum_group_counts_df$label, sebum_group_counts_df$sebum_group)

# 4. Set factor level order
PCA_whole_scores$sebum_group <- factor(PCA_whole_scores$sebum_group, levels = c("low", "medium", "high"))

# 5. Generate PCA plot
PCA_plot_sebum <- PCA_whole_scores %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, fill = sebum_group, color = sebum_group)) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 0.6, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_point(
    data = PCA_whole_scores %>%
      group_by(sebum_group) %>%
      summarise(across(matches("PC"), mean), .groups = "drop"),
    aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, fill = sebum_group, color = sebum_group),
    shape = 8, size = 4, inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Sebum Group",
    values = c("low" = "#4575b4", "medium" = "#fee0b6", "high" = "#e08214"),
    labels = sebum_group_labels
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Sebum Group",
    values = c("low" = "#4575b4", "medium" = "#fee0b6", "high" = "#e08214"),
    labels = sebum_group_labels
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "PCA of RCLR-Transformed Untargeted Metabolite Features by Sebum Level",
    x = paste0("PC1 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[1] * 100, 1), "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[2] * 100, 1), "%)")
  ) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11)
  ) +
  annotate("text", 
    x = Inf, y = Inf,
    label = label_text,
    hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.2, size = 3.8
  )

```

#Figure 4b
```{r}
features_skin <- skin_feature_info %>% filter(Mean_skin > 0) %>% pull(Feature)
features_BP <- BP_feature_info %>% filter(Mean_BP > 0) %>% pull(Feature)
features_QC <- qc_feature_info %>% filter(Mean_qc > 0) %>% pull(Feature)
features_blank <- blanks_feature_info %>% filter(Mean_blank > 0) %>% pull(Feature)
features_blankswabs <- blankswabs_feature_info %>% filter(Mean_ctl > 0) %>% pull(Feature)

```

```{r}


feature_lists <- list(
  Skin = features_skin,
  BP = features_BP,
  QC = features_QC,
  Blank = features_blank,
  "Blank Swabs" = features_blankswabs
)


```

```{r}
library(eulerr)

# Rename the lists

feature_lists_named <- feature_lists
names(feature_lists_named) <- c(
  "Skin",
  "Personal Care Ref",     # or whatever term you prefer
  "Quality Control",
  "Blank",
  "Blank Swabs"
)

# Fit Venn diagram
fit <- euler(feature_lists_named)

# Plot
venn_plot <- plot(fit,
     fills = c(
       "Skin" = "#daa600",
       "Personal Care Ref" = "#c00001",
       "Quality Control" = "#bcbddc",
       "Blank" = "#2ca25f",
       "Blank Swabs" = "#247cb9"
     ),
     #labels = list(font = 2),
     quantities = TRUE,
     legend = list(title = "Sample type", cex = 1),
     main = list(label = "Overlap of Untargeted Metabolite Features Across Sample Types", cex = 1.2)
)
#Overlap of Detected Features Across Sample Types
```

```{r}
venn_plot2 <- ggarrange(
  venn_plot, NULL,
  ncol = 2,
  nrow = 1,
  labels = c("b", "c"),
  common.legend = FALSE ,font.label = list(size = 18, face = "bold"), align ="hv"  # adjust size and style
)
```



```{r}
venn_pca <- ggarrange(
  PCA_plot_Face_site, PCA_plot_sebum, 
  ncol = 2,
  nrow = 1,
  labels = c("d", "e"),
  common.legend = FALSE ,font.label = list(size = 18, face = "bold"), align ="hv"  # adjust size and style
)
```

```{r}
top_grid <- ggarrange(heatmap_transposed,venn_plot2, venn_pca,
  ncol = 1, nrow = 3,
  labels = c("a", "", ""), # no label on boxplot_fg as it already has f/g inside
  heights = c(0.85,1, 1),font.label = list(size = 18, face = "bold")  # adjust size and style
  # optional: give a bit more room to the bottom row
)
```

```{r}
# 3. Save the full layout
ggsave("../figures/main/Figure4.png", #venn_sebum_3.png
       plot = top_grid,
       width = 16, height = 16, dpi = 300)

ggsave("../figures/main/Figure4.svg", #venn_sebum_3.svg
       plot = top_grid,
       width = 16, height = 16)
```



#Run PCA / PLSDA on only extreme cases of sebum concentration (7ug/cm^2 < and > 30 ug/cm^2); filtering of the table 
```{r}
# Filter and pull the filename2 values
extreme_filenames <- metadata_with_runorder_clean %>%
  dplyr::filter(sebum < 3.5 | sebum > 16.9) %>%  #7 and 20
  dplyr::pull(filename_2)
#Face_site == "Forehead", 
# View the result
extreme_filenames

```

```{r}
#ALTERNATIVE: FILTER OUT THOSE SAMPLES that are related to forehead, nose, cheek

extreme_filenames <- metadata_with_runorder_clean %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    (sebum < 3.5 | sebum > 16.9) &
    Face_site %in% c("Forehead", "Nose", "Cheek")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::pull(filename_2)

# View result
extreme_filenames

```

```{r}
# Filter data_sample to keep only the extreme samples
data_sample_extreme <- data_sample %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleID %in% extreme_filenames)

# View the result
data_sample_extreme

```


```{r}
# First, create the new column based on sebum values
metadata_with_runorder_clean <- metadata_with_runorder_clean %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Extreme_Sebum = dplyr::case_when(
      filename_2 %in% data_sample_extreme$SampleID & sebum < 3.5 ~ "Low", #7
      filename_2 %in% data_sample_extreme$SampleID & sebum > 16.9 ~ "High", #20
      TRUE ~ NA_character_  # Keep NA for all others
    )
  )

# View result
metadata_with_runorder_clean

```
```{r}
# Count number of Low and High in Extreme_Sebum
extreme_sebum_counts <- metadata_with_runorder_clean %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(Extreme_Sebum)) %>%
  dplyr::count(Extreme_Sebum)

# View result
extreme_sebum_counts

```
```{r}
# Assuming extreme_sebum_counts already exists
low_n <- extreme_sebum_counts %>% filter(Extreme_Sebum == "Low") %>% pull(n)
high_n <- extreme_sebum_counts %>% filter(Extreme_Sebum == "High") %>% pull(n)

```


```{r}
# RCLR transformation
data_sample_extreme_clr <- decostand(data_sample_extreme %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID"), method = "rclr")
```
```{r}
# PCA
PCA_whole <- mixOmics::pca(data_sample_extreme_clr, ncomp = 2, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)
PCA_whole_scores <- data.frame(PCA_whole$variates$X) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% left_join(metadata_with_runorder_clean, by = c("SampleID" = "filename_2"))
#PCA_whole_scores$Face_site <- factor(PCA_whole_scores$Face_site, levels=c("Forehead", "Nose", "Cheek", "Temple","Chin","Ear","Neck"))

i <- "Extreme_Sebum"


```


#correct counts
```{r}
# Count number of Low and High in Extreme_Sebum
sebum_counts <- PCA_whole_scores %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(Extreme_Sebum)) %>%
  dplyr::count(Extreme_Sebum)

# View result
sebum_counts
```

```{r}
# Assuming extreme_sebum_counts already exists
low_n <- sebum_counts %>% filter(Extreme_Sebum == "Low") %>% pull(n)
medium_n <-  sebum_counts %>% filter(Extreme_Sebum == "Medium") %>% pull(n)
high_n <- sebum_counts %>% filter(Extreme_Sebum == "High") %>% pull(n)
```

```{r}
# PERMANOVA
dist_metabolites <- vegdist(data_sample_extreme_clr, method = "euclidean")
disper_donor <- betadisper(dist_metabolites, PCA_whole_scores$Subject_ID)

#significant variation between the groups
anova(disper_donor)
permanova_sebumgroup <- adonis2(dist_metabolites ~ PCA_whole_scores$Subject_ID + PCA_whole_scores$Extreme_Sebum, PCA_whole_scores, na.action = na.omit, by="margin")
```

```{r}
sebum_row <- permanova_sebumgroup[2, ]
r2 <- round(sebum_row$R2 * 100, 1)
f_val <- round(sebum_row$F, 2)
p_val <- format(sebum_row$`Pr(>F)`, digits = 3, scientific = TRUE)

label_text <- paste0("PERMANOVA\nR² = ", r2, "%\nF = ", f_val, "\np = ", p_val)

```

```{r}
# Create PCA plot
PCA_plot_sebum_extreme <- PCA_whole_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = i, alpha = 0.6,
            title = "PCA of RCLR-Transformed Metabolite Features by Sebum Level",
            xlab = paste("PC1 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, 1), "%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("PC2 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, 1), "%)", sep = ""),
            ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  
  geom_point(data = PCA_whole_scores %>%
               group_by((!!sym(i))) %>%
               summarise(across(matches("PC"), mean)), 
             aes(PC1, PC2, color = (!!sym(i))), size = 4, shape = 8) +
  
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Sebum Group",
    values = c("Low" = "#4575b4", "High" = "#e08214"),
    labels = c(
      Low = paste0("Low (< 3.5 µg/cm²) (n=", low_n, ")"), #7
      High = paste0("High (> 16.9 µg/cm²) (n=", high_n, ")") #20
    )
  ) +
  
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 15), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 11)) +
  
  coord_fixed()+ annotate("text", 
    x = Inf, y = Inf,
    label = label_text,
    hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.2, size = 3.8
  )
```


```{r}
# PLSDA
PLSDA_extreme <- mixOmics::plsda(data_sample_extreme_clr, PCA_whole_scores$Extreme_Sebum, ncomp = 5, scale = TRUE)
PLSDA_extreme_scores <- data.frame(PLSDA_extreme$variates$X) %>%
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>%
  left_join(metadata_with_runorder_clean, by = c("SampleID" = "filename_2"))



# Create PLS-DA plot
PLSDA_extreme_plot <- PLSDA_extreme_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "comp1", y = "comp2", color = "Extreme_Sebum", alpha = 0.6,
            title = "PLS-DA of RCLR-Transformed Metabolite Features by Sebum Level",
            xlab = paste("Component 1 (", round(PLSDA_extreme$prop_expl_var$X[1] * 100, 1), "%)", sep = ""),
            ylab = paste("Component 2 (", round(PLSDA_extreme$prop_expl_var$X[2] * 100, 1), "%)", sep = ""),
            ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  
  geom_point(
    data = PLSDA_extreme_scores %>%
      group_by(Extreme_Sebum) %>%
      summarise(across(matches("comp"), mean)),
    aes(comp1, comp2, color = Extreme_Sebum),
    size = 4, shape = 8
  ) +
  
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Sebum Group",
    values = c("Low" = "#4575b4", "High" = "#e08214"),
    labels = c(
      Low = paste0("Low (< 3.5 µg/cm²) (n=", low_n, ")"),
      High = paste0("High (> 16.9 µg/cm²) (n=", high_n, ")")
    )
  ) +
  
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11)
  ) +
  
  coord_fixed() 
```
```{r}
# Save ggplot object as an RDS file
saveRDS(PLSDA_extreme_plot, file = "~/OneDrive - UGent/CMET/Shiseido_Project/Figures/Metabolomics/PLSDA_extreme_plot.rds")

```


```{r}
Loadings_extreme <- plotLoadings(PLSDA_extreme, contrib = "max") %>%
  as.data.frame(check.names = FALSE) %>%
  rownames_to_column()
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)
# Dynamically remove 'X.' prefix if it exists
colnames(Loadings_extreme) <- gsub("^X\\.", "", colnames(Loadings_extreme))

# Now, select the columns of interest
Loadings_extreme <- Loadings_extreme %>%
  dplyr::select(rowname, GroupContrib, importance)

perf_PLSDA_extreme <- perf(PLSDA_extreme, validation = "Mfold", folds =5, nrepeat=100, auc=TRUE) #perform 100 iunstead of 10 M-fold or loo
plot(perf_PLSDA_extreme, legend = FALSE)
```

```{r}

png("../figures/supplementary/suppl_fig11.png", res = 300, width = 5, height = 5, units = "in")
 
# Generate the PLS-DA performance plot
plot(perf_PLSDA_extreme)

# Close the device to save the plot
dev.off()

```

```{r}
print(perf_PLSDA_extreme$error.rate)
print(perf_PLSDA_extreme$auc)

```
```{r}
colnames(perf_PLSDA_extreme)
```


```{r}
#when excluding chin, ear, neck, temple ; ONLY FOREHEAD, NOSE CHEEK
label_text <- paste0("AUC = 0.92, BER = 0.14")
```


```{r}
# Create PLS-DA plot
PLSDA_extreme_plot <- PLSDA_extreme_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "comp1", y = "comp2", color = "Extreme_Sebum", alpha = 0.6,
            title = "PLS-DA of RCLR-Transformed Metabolite Features by Sebum Level",
            xlab = paste("Component 1 (", round(PLSDA_extreme$prop_expl_var$X[1] * 100, 1), "%)", sep = ""),
            ylab = paste("Component 2 (", round(PLSDA_extreme$prop_expl_var$X[2] * 100, 1), "%)", sep = ""),
            ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  
  geom_point(
    data = PLSDA_extreme_scores %>%
      group_by(Extreme_Sebum) %>%
      summarise(across(matches("comp"), mean)),
    aes(comp1, comp2, color = Extreme_Sebum),
    size = 4, shape = 8
  ) +
  
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Sebum Group",
    values = c("Low" = "#4575b4", "High" = "#e08214"),
    labels = c(
      Low = paste0("Low (< 3.5 µg/cm²) (n=", low_n, ")"),
      High = paste0("High (> 16.9 µg/cm²) (n=", high_n, ")")
    )
  ) +
  
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11)
  ) +
  
  coord_fixed() +
  
  coord_fixed()+ annotate("text", 
    x = Inf, y = Inf,
    label = label_text,
    hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.2, size = 3.8
  )
```

```{r}
VIPs_extreme <- as.data.frame(mixOmics::vip(PLSDA_extreme))
VIPs_extreme_filter <- dplyr::filter(VIPs_extreme, VIPs_extreme$comp1 > 1) # larger than 1 is seen as an important component
VIPs_extreme_filter$ID <- rownames(VIPs_extreme_filter)
VIPs_extreme_select <- VIPs_extreme_filter %>% dplyr::select(ID, comp1)
VIPs_extreme_Load <- VIPs_extreme_select %>% 
  left_join(Loadings_extreme, by = c("ID" = "rowname")) %>% arrange(desc(comp1)) %>%
  left_join(info_feature_complete, by = c("ID" = "Feature")) %>% dplyr::select(1:8)
```



```{r}

write_csv(x = VIPs_extreme_Load, file = "../output/metabolomics/PLSDA/VIPs_extreme_Load_data.csv")

```

```{r}
VIPs_extreme_Load <- read_csv("../output/metabolomics/PLSDA/VIPs_extreme_Load_data_SZ_MC_PD_05072025.csv")
```

```{r}
VIPs_extreme_Load2 <- VIPs_extreme_Load %>%
  mutate(
    cytoscape_annotation = if_else(
      is.na(Compound_Name) | Compound_Name == "",
      paste0("(m/z: ", round(mz, 2), ", RT: ", round(RT, 2), ")"),
      paste0(Compound_Name_2, " (m/z: ", round(mz, 2), ", RT: ", round(RT, 2), ")")
    )
  )
```


```{r}
#adapted it for Compound_Name2
VIPs_anno <- VIPs_extreme_Load %>%
  filter(!is.na(Compound_Name_2))

# Set compound names as rownames
rownames(VIPs_anno) <- VIPs_anno$Compound_Name_2


```

```{r}

#selected_ids <- c(2059,2287, 2069, 1921, 45, 2441, 2509, 2245)
selected_ids <- c(2314,1744, 2069, 1883, 2409, 2509, 2287, 2160)
selected_ids <- c(2314,1744, 2069, 1883, 2409, 2509, 2287, 2160,1536,1011) #to remove diethylphtalate and maybe also diphenhydramine
VIPs_selected <- VIPs_anno %>% filter(ID %in% selected_ids)
VIPs_remaining <- VIPs_anno %>% filter(!(ID %in% selected_ids))

```
```{r}
# Recreate sebum_group thresholds (same as earlier in your code)
q          <- quantile(metadata_with_runorder_clean$sebum, probs = c(0.25, 0.75), na.rm = TRUE)
low_thresh  <- q[1]
high_thresh <- q[2]

# Build clr_long with sebum_group created inline
clr_long <- data_sample_clr %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>%
  left_join(
    metadata_with_runorder_clean %>%
      dplyr::select(filename_2, sebum) %>%
      mutate(
        sebum_group = case_when(
          sebum <  low_thresh  ~ "low",
          sebum <= high_thresh ~ "medium",
          sebum >  high_thresh ~ "high"
        )
      ),
    by = c("SampleID" = "filename_2")
  ) %>%
  rename(group = sebum_group) %>%
  filter(!is.na(group))

# Counts per group
sebum_counts <- clr_long %>% count(group)
low_n    <- sebum_counts %>% filter(group == "low")    %>% pull(n)
medium_n <- sebum_counts %>% filter(group == "medium") %>% pull(n)
high_n   <- sebum_counts %>% filter(group == "high")   %>% pull(n)

colors <- c("low" = "#4575b4", "medium" = "#fee0b6", "high" = "#e08214")
```



```{r}
make_vip_boxplots <- function(vip_df, clr_data, output_prefix) {
  plots <- list()

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(vip_df))) {
    metabolite     <- as.character(vip_df$ID[i])
    metabolite_name <- vip_df$Compound_Name_2[i]
    mz_value       <- round(vip_df$mz[i], 2)
    rt_value       <- round(vip_df$RT[i], 2)

    clr_data$group <- factor(clr_data$group, levels = c("low", "medium", "high"))

    temp_data <- clr_data %>%
      dplyr::select(group, !!sym(metabolite)) %>%
      filter(!is.na(.data[[metabolite]]))

    kw_res  <- kruskal.test(temp_data[[metabolite]] ~ temp_data$group)
    p_val   <- kw_res$p.value
    stars   <- if (p_val < 0.001) "***" else if (p_val < 0.01) "**" else if (p_val < 0.05) "*" else "ns"
    label_text <- paste0("Kruskal-Wallis p = ", signif(p_val, 3), " ", stars)
    y_max   <- max(temp_data[[metabolite]], na.rm = TRUE)

    p <- clr_data %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = group, y = .data[[metabolite]], fill = group, color = group)) +
      geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, color = "black", width = 0.5) +
      geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.6, size = 0.5) +
      scale_fill_manual(values  = colors) +
      scale_color_manual(values = colors) +
      scale_x_discrete(labels = c(
        "low"    = paste0("Low Sebum\n(< 3.5 µg/cm²)\n(n = ",       low_n,    ")"),
        "medium" = paste0("Medium Sebum\n(3.5–16.9 µg/cm²)\n(n = ", medium_n, ")"),
        "high"   = paste0("High Sebum\n(> 16.9 µg/cm²)\n(n = ",     high_n,   ")")
      )) +
      labs(
        y     = paste0("rclr ", metabolite_name, "\n(m/z: ", mz_value, ", RT: ", rt_value, ")"),
        x     = NULL,
        title = metabolite_name
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
        plot.title   = element_text(size = 15),
        axis.ticks   = element_line(),
        panel.grid   = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        axis.line    = element_line(color = "black")
      ) +
      annotate("text", x = 2, y = y_max * 1.1, label = label_text, size = 4)

    plots[[length(plots) + 1]] <- p
  }
  return(plots)
}
```


```{r}
vip_plots <-make_vip_boxplots(VIPs_selected, clr_long, "selected_VIPs")
vip_remaining_plots <-make_vip_boxplots(VIPs_remaining, clr_long, "remaining_VIPs")

```

```{r}
# Select and arrange your desired plots
final_figure <- ggarrange(
  vip_plots[[1]], vip_plots[[4]], vip_plots[[3]],vip_plots[[8]], 
  NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL,
  vip_plots[[2]], vip_plots[[5]], vip_plots[[6]], vip_plots[[7]],
  NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL,
  ncol = 4, nrow = 4,
  labels = c("d", "e", "f", "g", "", "", "", "", "h", "i","j", "k", "", "", "","" ),
  heights = c(1, 0.75, 1, 0.75),
  font.label = list(size = 16, face = "bold")
)

# Show it in the viewer
print(final_figure)
```
